name: American Update
subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9692%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QRv4bF0IDMZGHiVldWNdxw&sysid=1)
# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=22Z7ZimUG9%2ffHkVVOtjJAw&sysid=1) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25229%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g3hc1c00%2fOz7B%2bUGRYQLfQ&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25220%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZN%2bJnv5aA8PKKMbBnRixDQ&sysid=1) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25221%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NfjjJuM4Fh2E2ujrvsYmHg&sysid=1) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25222%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zwZHbY8O2A3vFlKxM9jQNA&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PdP5BNxarMGjZPMV84sqLQ&sysid=1)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25224%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zebpJEm5KjMRMy4xgfpjZQ&sysid=1) **You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25235%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tpGtLlznzDEZ7Aq46CXm4g&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PdP5BNxarMGjZPMV84sqLQ&sysid=1)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25236%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GZGXxtDM4HT6G9TLAGvh4Q&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gVM0mhfVgL%2bnu6YHX9%2bUtg&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PdP5BNxarMGjZPMV84sqLQ&sysid=1)** To your survival,

# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkst5olmlq0vfm7h2suhl30qert45qq18kduh3n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1geepj2cth2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt9us58mhlivd0qp2jvi7accup6k58n4n48gv7mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1geepj2cth2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. # Outrage Over Survival Food
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8388d20neallo93lra2t9e19bl13pu8757trma8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ge1oj6c1h2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ccak75mdnb859k8vf8gs447oughn1l79eot00o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ge1oj6c1h2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
_Sponsored message_

# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp182gpdslij4epd3vj1c1ddg9i1d89ps7glhhm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zstiinkg4sugfvjkss3bt8j4felmvruu3vgcmda0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z78jnhqok5pcl8c2jaormsaqcnk0qebrsf9upmqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo30eo92dqn71q546aqmvofh0u5ee4gcqeck48g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2octmkata196mmr3nqevp62gob5d7sugad001jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1226nphb12790o8h7lnanbo2blidg9hs8qv6da8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you 're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn9u4vrih2qkei4ev91ju23tms2hkh7jdbiv9rag_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) **You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgtget0frhpv8gnub30311jkl538phenljkp931g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfslorlvq4v50o229gv4r1errprrja91cmr4gauo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3p72heicu94iljqqlj0hk22rqjqa1trpso9ec5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z623g0404hlth4ecjsj3seaa0oj2pjqhomfjt03o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfonn6qrgc63jg4j9eva0a8a0lf2dddh2ccc7eu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgjadiifqu6q7qssjan1mst0n6jrjrflm1pqrs6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth2bs)**
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zvfuusdsj7jslt3hfk6hqmp49duvm2a3tpu50c3g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4f47hc5ci05vp3tmsvugm8pq3feplatjf5m3b5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie0o34cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs07jr12ih3vuk6630ep5nphtomt1guiqt92sfbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ge9p34cth2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z87ickpmn38thugv3rmpglionb57i01ka3hkd4eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ge9p34cth2bs). This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.

And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

# * Ballot Access*
### **Major Parties Are Using****Unconstitutional**** Schemes!**
**Deirdre Gilbert is now fighting this battle.** Texas Voters, in July 2019 a group of Texas voters, candidates and minor political parties filed a federal lawsuit in Austin, alleging that the Texas Election Code violates their First and Fourteenth amendment rights and that it imposed discriminatory and severely burdensome requirements. The filing of that lawsuit headed by Oliver Hall of the Center of Competitive Democracy challenged the impact of having to obtain handwritten voter signatures that must be submitted on paper nomination petitions in a limited amount of time. Independent Candidates are the only group that have to overcome the hurdle of collecting 83,000-plus valid signatures, no options to pay a filing fee or to collect the minimum of 5,000 that the Republican, Democrats and a Write-In candidate has the option to do. It is essential that Texans have the options of choosing their own candidates and the time is NOW. If you did not vote in the 2022 primaries and you are a registered voter, and you want to help me get on the ballot in November, please sign the Independent Petition Request so that we can schedule a date and time to come by and physically get you to sign. https://form.jotform.com/220695470995166 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-btjxut-iduiyhurdd-y/)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
_Sponsored message_
# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc8p5kputon79824818ptfgor8tfg1nfvtja13h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv35vtm0qreo471enh4j39e5m5l2gs33qtt1r79o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6clqtj167ph3c62ac42vveeere1psjinagf5njg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvjg75rpidb7ij0jk9pjp9p0v6s3poe908ca2ti0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn9a875dh1t56b9l8hodt1mpi4gbbp5cmpdt8rc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zem30c913cba2le3e0hkgnln9or1fsv8dds9v1cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you 're getting huge savings today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok4b9o64pjm3gsbji4jj2a4a4tab6iojbemtmt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) **You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrj8i247ovinr48dkmmr7jmeibqa0ktqlrvu3s3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd60nirn6cgqrmlk0m1omburqq1a07cdj3ge07bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvg2hscv2u5tdqnt2tjk9ft93puvkh7v7os3pqto_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z744gp8civ8jsi73igh9kg0tpqpcmpkej83436jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z48snmiubgv92ii2dfhbkvi0b4r4dhsj7iagbtt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ie8o72cdh2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.

clean_body: As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. Sponsored message Outrage Over Survival Food According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished... Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a fraction of what some other brands charge. There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a shelf life of up to 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they taste as good or better than any other survival food I 've ever had. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits Sold Out Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock! Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock... They're going to load you up with when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a ton and they're just getting warmed up, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... (Hold on to your hat, folks) FREE Bonus #2: They're also going to give you their Victory Garden Seed Collection. Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: They're also going to give you their Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF Your Next Purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling. Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan. Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still return triple your purchase amount. That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it 's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters | | Rory H. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing our most important mid-month deadline of the campaign, and right now we’re still very short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**

Friend,
---
Thanks to your support, we just had a victory in court!
---
**_A judge just DISMISSED charges filed against me by Eric Swalwell – the House Democrat who has been accused of sleeping with a Chinese spy named Fang Fang._**
---
_I know I ask for your support quite a bit, so I wanted to be sure to share this great news with you, Friend._
---
Truth be told, there simply haven’t been many victories to celebrate...
---
...It’s been a rough year since the FBI first raided my apartment and I’m still facing a mountain of legal battles, which is why I’m hoping you’ll donate on the heels of this victory.

subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore.Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-G1F1x_anothg).Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._TcLM0LijsZfFfr9iTg)**Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special:**It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window.So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because...[**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-MAVoeJ_THjg)**FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today.That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website.So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND..._(Hold on to your hat, folks)_**FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years.**FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos.**FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase.But that's not all because you also get...**FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE.**FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit.**FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food.But we're still not done because you also get...**FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal.But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get...**FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** Isn't that great?The best part is...The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-8p8vETH7AwL3w)**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock.**Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-cpO0r9yxEZoPava6_0w)First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try.Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** You need to get 'er done today.Why?Because if you don't [take action](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._rAUUr2oLFA) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless.But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._2g). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit.**As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._YsCHHxDWKAHjPvQ)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters| | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: The lizard people are trying to divide us
body:
In a world of division... What unites us? I've been struck by all the images from the Canadian Trucker Rally — friendship, s
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zka2tmcf4jp5bi6utq0hbf30utjuaphbctma9js0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcpdk69q7fcpnmir30oj1mcrbbchjmtgrecj4clqn3cr1ctgrco5hc9jm8opgc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5ddgc1rm6phh62qr8dtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhk23ma53d47g4nheipn7bridmkq6vjjga27le4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Hello Friend,

**In a world of division ...**

What unites us?

I've been struck by all the images from the Canadian Trucker Rally -- friendship, support, community, unity.

Freedom unites us. Those who hate freedom want us to be divided.

So what does that mean for us, as parents and grandparents?

It means that we need to teach our children about the ideas of freedom and how these ideas can heal our world.

We need to teach them about how entrepreneurs make our lives better through innovation and problem-solving.

We need to teach them how the Golden Rule is the universal law that makes safe and strong societies.

We need to teach them what their rights are and who wants to violate them -- and why these forces don't like independent thinkers.

We want to help you help your children.

That's why I created the Tuttle Twins.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Connor Boyack, and I'm the author of _The Tuttle Twins_ series.

_The Tuttle Twins_ is a freedom-focused educational series that teaches kids about the ideas of individual liberty, limited government, rule of law, logic, and free-market economics.

I know how dear the ideas of liberty and freedom are to you, Friend.

[_**Will you donate $10, $20, $50, or any generous amount to provide a Tuttle Twins book to a child? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zicvm8j63itppvdqqe9chg8306qm2hj0fml4cqeo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)

I am dedicated to empowering you as you provide resources to our children in need, Friend.

I want my children to have books they enjoy while also learning about these important ideas that made America the greatest country in the world.

And I want the same for the children in your life -- your children, grandchildren, and the kids in your community need your help today.

Will you help introduce 1,000 students to liberty this month by sending them a copy of the Tuttle Twins? **Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 for 1 Book >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqahso020s27gl8ifpqg381g1c285otajjjbtdpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $20 for 2 Books >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk8afdp8ntav7q5lurlikk1l4h3hdfv6aukrtlco_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 for 5 Books >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqf95kanmonbprd0pbvdpvf7ekfkdaujkci4pjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 for 10 Books >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo4qrh9d1vesrl9hk3gubv1kem8dgfn9psljrm00_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 for 25 Books >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fn5m008g24i9fg55ilio3pbcqmdqqdghlg8sq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 for 100 Books >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z59s49frmeas7qigeeq60qsc5n2amb7c3rtoq2lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5i47q5laklg2dte5p8jt6cpsf9pd3iraibaqmoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)

Here's how it works:
1. Libertas Institute distributes copies of the Tuttle Twins to students and families across the country, giving kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.

2. Families and educators actively teach their kids about the ideas of freedom and responsibility after receiving our books in the mail.

3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfjsf8nkgcm63f4030h58bkf6rg9oks0n8j45tm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh2bs)

Together, we can make 2022 a year of unity and liberty.

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
President, Libertas Institute

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z03dv5c14vteha54gpi9nuo9micr663vj8rhto2g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn33dpn36oqtvhdv9etgr6e3h63h4uq3b4do3mjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1iecor3clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

clean_body: As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. Outrage Over Survival Food According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished... Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a fraction of what some other brands charge. There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. name: Charlie Crist
subject: DeSantis and his right-wing, billionaire donors are trying to crush us under a tidal wave of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Can I count on you to fight back? |
---

| | Friend,

_Gov. DeSantis and his right-wing, billionaire donors are trying to crush us under a tidal wave of money._

They’re hoping all their $$$ can shore up DeSantis — even as poll after poll shows me neck-and-neck with him or even taking the lead!

**_[Beating DeSantis and his billionaire pals won’t be easy, but if we assemble the largest grassroots movement in Florida’s history,_it can be done._ So I'm looking for 500 supporters to make an urgent donation to my team.
