name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 3/11
body:
Ukraine, rising gas prices, and banning soda?
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-typptl-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 3/11/22
Good evening,The fight continues for Team Chabot. Congressman Chabot has been focused on ensuring that we're doing all we can to support Ukraine, finding ways to expand American energy production, and fighting back against inflation. Meanwhile, Greg Landsman is trying to tell parents what their kids can drink. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Congressman Chabot - Filed for Re-election_ Last week, Congressman Chabot officially filed his paperwork to run for re-election in Ohio's 1st Congressional District. _" Congressman Chabot has always taken on the tough fights and won. This year will be no different. The hardworking people of Ohio's first district know they have a champion in Steve Chabot, who works tirelessly to deliver results for southwest Ohio communities, and small businesses. Congressman Chabot looks forward to earning his reelection in 2022 and building on his proven track record of results -- especially by reversing the disastrous policies of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi that led to historic inflation that costs First District families more for everything."_ \- Jon Conradi, Campaign Spokesman _Congressman Chabot on 700WLW_ On Wednesday, Congressman Chabot spoke with Dan Carroll on 700WLW regarding the invasion of Ukraine and the Biden Administration's lies about American energy production._" I'm for an all-of-the-above energy policy. [...] Let's have an energy policy that makes sense and fits our needs."_ - Congressman Chabot. You can listen to the full interview [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-y/) at the beginning of the episode._Congressman Chabot at the Century Club Breakfast_ Last Saturday, Congressman Chabot spoke to Warren County Republican Party's Century Club. It was a great event and was great to speak to voters in Warren County about the challenges we're facing because of the Biden Administration's failures and weakness. **_Greg Landsman - Banning Soda?_** This week our opponent Greg Landsman came out with his grand idea to save the city of Cincinnati. Was it a plan to crack down on rising crime? Was it a proposal to solve the firefighter shortage? Was it an idea for how to attract new businesses and jobs? No.His idea?[ Ban restaurants from listing soda on kid's menus.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-j/) While Congressman Chabot is focused on fighting inflation, lowering gas prices, and making sure that our neighborhoods are safe, Greg Landsman is trying to use the government to tell parents what their kids can drink.Priorities. _This Week 's Blog - "Too Little, Too Late?"_This week's blog is about the ongoing situation in Ukraine and what we must do domestically to help support Ukraine's defense._" Vladimir Putin continues his relentless, brutal, illegal attack on Ukraine, including the murder of civilians. The Ukrainians have been heroic in the defense of their country, but the Russians are slowly but surely grinding them down."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-t/). In closing this week, continue to pray for the people of Ukraine as they endure the next stages of this unjust invasion. Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-i/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-u/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-typptl-kujkulhluu-o/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-typptl-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-typptl-kujkulhluu-p/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-typptl-l-z) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-typptl-961825B2-kujkulhluu-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-typptl-kujkulhluu-e/)
---

subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
Hi Team,
Maggie Toulouse Oliver, New Mexico Secretary of State here. In a minute I’m going to ask if you can rush a $20 donation to help DASS hit their critical $35,000 mid-month goal, but first let me explain: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
Last month, I told Politico “not to be hyperbolic, but our democracy is at stake”.
Since then, that’s only become more true. Just in the last few weeks, we’ve learned: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D] *
Trump and Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court has their sights set on gutting the Voting Rights Act.

Other GOP-appointed courts are upholding blatantly gerrymandered districts that curtail political participation.

The Arizona Republican Party is trying to end early voting in their state.

And far-right conspiracy theorists like Mike Lindell are launching ridiculous lawsuits designed to fire up the far-right base and supercharge their fundraising.
All that means that this year’s upcoming midterm elections will decide the fate of American democracy itself.
There are 27 Secretary of State races this November, and if ‘big lie’ supporting radicals win any, they could cast our democracy into chaos – and that’s before you get to the swing-state races!
To make matters worse, the far-right is receiving an unprecedented surge in donations – our opponents at the RSLC raked in a record-breaking $33 MILLION last year they’ll use to elect far-right extremists. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
DASS is fighting back, but we can’t do it alone. Will you rush $20 to help us hit our critical $35,000 and save democracy from the far-right? Not to be hyperbolic, but our democracy itself is at stake. >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?refcode=EM_FR_031222_B1_AC_30D&amount=5]
Thank you,
Maggie Toulouse Oliver
New Mexico Secretary of State
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]
This email was sent to: email. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on our Democratic agenda. If you no longer wish to receive these emails click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/90a3c8e2-f69f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/060a102d-15a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjBhMTAyZC0xNWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ppBlGH-7R4HO8GlmS8bE3iGiKEzvsCUyZLMFDWb5HU=&id=130343606 .

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I'll never stop fighting to protect a woman's right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Our reproductive rights are under attack, friend.

Last year alone, GOP lawmakers enacted more than 100 abortion restrictions in at least 19 states across the country – including the extreme law in Texas, which bans abortion after just six weeks of pregnancy.
This right-wing assault on reproductive freedom puts women's health care and very lives in jeopardy. **And w****ith a conservative majority on our Supreme Court poised to __ overturn Roe v. Wade at any moment, we must do everything in our power to fight back immediately.**
That’s why I just voted in the Senate to advance legislation that would _codify_ the right to abortion under federal law – and neutralize any state laws banning or restricting access to reproductive health. But friend, Mitch McConnell and the GOP blocked this critical bill from passing.
**I'll never stop fighting to protect a woman's right to choose what's best for her own body – but I can't do it alone. I'm looking for 10,000 folks to speak out NOW and sign my new petition to defend reproductive rights, and I'm counting on you to be one of them.**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: need you to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress
body:
Folks — [**I’m about to ask you to split a $5 donation between my friend Marcy Kaptur’s campaign and mine.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42890681/334762666/293024761?refcode=EM_FR_220312TROhio_N_TR_90DO_7_NG_N_l1_TESTB&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ1ZGY1Yi0xOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feA3MO0KGjN8Q3U-l8K0gIvVPFkLugCmJH6hTj-X7e4=) But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.
1. **Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring,** leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. **Ohio already has a Democratic Senator.** Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. **A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.** It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over.
4. **Working people are fed up and ready for change.** I’ve been traveling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. **We have grassroots momentum.** While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, folks, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off.

[**_Here’s my ask: Will you split a $5 donation between Marcy and me to help us keep up our grassroots energy and hit our fundraising goals?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42890683/334762668/293024761?refcode=EM_FR_220312TROhio_N_TR_90DO_7_NG_N_l1_TESTB&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ1ZGY1Yi0xOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feA3MO0KGjN8Q3U-l8K0gIvVPFkLugCmJH6hTj-X7e4=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42890685/334762670/293024761?refcode=EM_FR_220312TROhio_N_TR_90DO_7_NG_N_b1_TESTB&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ1ZGY1Yi0xOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feA3MO0KGjN8Q3U-l8K0gIvVPFkLugCmJH6hTj-X7e4=) Together, I know we can get this done.

— Tim Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress
PO Box 899
Toledo, OH 43697
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e8b98858-8da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/9645df5b-19a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQ1ZGY1Yi0xOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feA3MO0KGjN8Q3U-l8K0gIvVPFkLugCmJH6hTj-X7e4=&id=103714516).

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zerc9djfure64rrv9tjahoq4rkppoiito65i9aoo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboecdhgcqpr4t3ic5g69c9j6hojfcbkeprm2pbgchp61db46phb4sb0cjgjctr7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj38p5l6krr5cj66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm0p77c9h60oh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl4cmkrn1mpecd5stvauf207cbkeu1jgdcq0q8j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ieeoj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs7uit3326rhk5auoln4metrhjsrerdpimrgsrpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ieeoj2c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj5issk9idbudl2q6h8ae4iqrf89gh7p9i8uvg2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ieeoj2c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcaq68d8npm2uidsgibf0mls8bgdl4a88m3cg0ng_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ieeoj2c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mefp375bg18ld13ksktg5g00kad6ttjdhob06o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ieeoj2c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4l9ohuo6sk43tpk9pc9jpui7pq647lgiglh6qq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c1ieeoj2c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: I am ready to lead us toward a more just future and flip Maryland BLUE this November. | = | Peter, Backyard by backyard, ad by ad, and event after event, I have laid out my progressive vision to make Maryland state government a transformative force for good. And with every county we visit and every Marylander I have the privilege to speak with, it’s clear that voters share my vision for a more equitable future and believe in our movement to create real, positive change. I am ready to lead us toward a more just future and flip Maryland BLUE this November, but I need YOUR help to do it, Peter. = If you agree with me that we need to: ✔️ Tackle the climate crisis head-on ✔️ Ensure strong public schools in every community and raise teacher pay ✔️ Improve women’s economic equity and close the wage gap ✔️ Reform our criminal justice system = We need to make sure every voter learns about my story and my progressive values — but that won’t happen if we don’t have the resources. = | | = Thank you, John * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Nate Sandvig
subject: I want to know what YOU think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
Let me know where you stand! Read more>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/b8ebfb29ca819adc/f403f6bc0f100641c3d6b838967d376c/37283)

Friends, As I travel the 6th District, I’ve met countless Oregonians who are worried about the direction our country is headed. From runaway inflation to tyrannical vaccine mandates to open borders, there are so many issues we need to tackle. And I’d like to know what matters most to _you_. Will you please take my quick poll to let me know your thoughts?

subject: What a donation of $8.20 can do for our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Hey team, our mid-month fundraising deadline is on Tuesday and we set a goal to raise $10,000 to help us build the infrastructure we need to flip Ohio blue in November.

We know $10,000 seems high, so we crunched the numbers and if every person who reads this email chips in an average of $8.20, we'll be able to hit our goal by Tuesday's midnight deadline.

Here's what your donation of $8.20 would go toward:
* More resources to train Democratic candidates across the state;
* More resources to grow and train members of the ODP team;
* More resources to invest into our email and online advertising programs;
* And more opportunities to flip Ohio blue.

It's clear: hitting our goals is the key to a blue Ohio in 2022, and if we fall short, it'll be even harder to move our state forward.

[**Before Tuesday's deadline, chip in $8.20 to help us hit our March mid-month fundraising goal. Momentum is building for Karen's historic campaign for mayor, and we just entered a crucial phase.

Team —

**Big news!** Our grassroots voter engagement efforts are officially in full swing, and we just entered the next phase of Karen's historic campaign for Los Angeles mayor.

Volunteers from across the city are making calls, going door-to-door, sending out text messages, and sharing Karen's vision with folks across L.A.

Now that we've entered this next phase, it's clear momentum is building for Karen's historic campaign for mayor. We're officially on the ballot, and House Speaker Nancy Pelosi just endorsed Karen this week. Leaders, organizations, and activists from across the region are joining Karen's campaign, and we're kicking things into high gear.

**[Will you join Speaker Pelosi, Representative Katie Porter, Dolores Huerta, and EMILY's List in supporting Karen's campaign for mayor? clean_body: Momentum is building for Karen's historic campaign for mayor, and we just entered a crucial phase. Team — Big news! Our grassroots voter engagement efforts are officially in full swing, and we just entered the next phase of Karen's historic campaign for Los Angeles mayor. Volunteers from across the city are making calls, going door-to-door, sending out text messages, and sharing Karen's vision with folks across L.A. Now that we've entered this next phase, it's clear momentum is building for Karen's historic campaign for mayor. We're officially on the ballot, and House Speaker Nancy Pelosi just endorsed Karen this week. Leaders, organizations, and activists from across the region are joining Karen's campaign, and we're kicking things into high gear. We'd like to show Karen the final supporter list to share just how strong this movement is, so we appreciate you signing on! name: Chief Val Demings
subject: my story of police service
body:
Derek,
This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: Will you split a contribution of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings]
Back in 1983, I was one of only three women in my police academy class. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's Chief of Police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed Chief of Police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to healthcare and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood of $25 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings]
Here's the best link: secure.actblue.com/donate/Demings_CGVA [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220312_CGVA_Demings]
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.
Chief Val Demings
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Nan Whaley
subject: My plan for Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
As governor, I will revitalize our communities by bringing back Main Street businesses and investing in companies that invest in Ohio.

Team,
You’ve heard me talk a lot about building a stronger Ohio, but if there’s one thing I’ve learned as Mayor of Dayton it’s that you can’t just talk the talk. You have to work hard and get things done – so I want to tell you how I plan to do that.
One of my first priorities is stopping the corruption that’s disrupted our politics for the last 30 years. So, I plan to create a Public Accountability Commission to oversee executive branch ethics complaints. And that’s only step one.
**[To build an Ohio where all of us can thrive, we have to tackle corruption head-on. I’m ready to bring transparency into our government. Will you donate $5 towards our mid-month goals to help me become governor of Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42896676/334778983/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220312_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzMwMDlhOS0yNWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dtYqJqyRBP0sct8lBnBTmjrxBSsBHgeDmUZRuWyObXM=)**
But I know corruption isn’t the only thing I need to tackle. We deserve a state where one good job is enough to provide for our families and where our families don’t have to leave for new opportunities.

Team, You’ve heard me talk a lot about building a stronger Ohio, but if there’s one thing I’ve learned as Mayor of Dayton it’s that you can’t just talk the talk. You have to work hard and get things done – so I want to tell you how I plan to do that. One of my first priorities is stopping the corruption that’s disrupted our politics for the last 30 years. So, I plan to create a Public Accountability Commission to oversee executive branch ethics complaints. And that’s only step one. = But I know corruption isn’t the only thing I need to tackle. We deserve a state where one good job is enough to provide for our families and where our families don’t have to leave for new opportunities. name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: Every mom is a working mom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Here’s how Congress can support working moms every day.
#
Peter,
**Today is Working Mom’s Day** – and in addition to thanking moms for the extraordinary work they do, I’m focused on passing policies that will help them and their families not just get by, but thrive.
Just over a year ago, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan without a single Republican vote. In that bill, we expanded the Child Tax Credit, established direct payments, provided support for schools to help get kids back in the classroom and address learning loss, and so much more. We got money directly in the pockets of families when they needed it.
**[This was a good start to build an economy that works for working moms–but we’ve got more to do. Will you sign the petition now to support my continued work to lift up working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42896816/334780210/1386430074?ms=pm_em_220312_1&refcode=pm_em_220312_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2U3NGFlZC0yNWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG8qD6oqBugxK7WA4G0RuV8zqq31Q3yU0eXDe6Abccs=&emci=13495f65-5da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=33e74aed-25a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13116610)**
I am a mom, grandma, and a former educator. I know firsthand the challenges families can face and the difference it can make if the economy is working for you, not against. The American Rescue Plan was a good start, but there’s still more we need to do to lower costs for families on everything from child care to prescription drug costs.
And while Democrats are focused on lowering costs for families, Republicans are pushing plans to raise taxes on families and making health care more expensive.
**[It’s an important moment to make our voices heard, Peter. Please – add your name now if you’re with me in the fight for working moms and families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42896817/334780211/1386430074?ms=pm_em_220312_1&refcode=pm_em_220312_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2U3NGFlZC0yNWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG8qD6oqBugxK7WA4G0RuV8zqq31Q3yU0eXDe6Abccs=&emci=13495f65-5da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=33e74aed-25a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Senator Patty Murray

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42896818/334780212/1386430074?ms=pm_em_220312_1&refcode=pm_em_220312_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2U3NGFlZC0yNWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG8qD6oqBugxK7WA4G0RuV8zqq31Q3yU0eXDe6Abccs=&emci=13495f65-5da1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=33e74aed-25a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13116610)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

subject: Latest out of Iowa

body:
Polls show that Iowa does not want to reelect Sen. Chuck Grassley (R)
| | |
---
**HUGE news out of Iowa, Peter – and it's not looking good. **
**FIRST:** After polling revealed more than two-thirds of likely Iowa voters don't want to reelect Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), Democrat Abby Finkenauer launched her campaign – giving Democrats the best chance in _decades_ to flip this Senate seat blue.
**THEN:** The campaign arm of the Senate Republicans raised more than $100 MILLION to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley. It's a huge spending advantage they can use to dismantle Democrats' Senate majority.
**NOW:** **Abby is still falling about $35,000 short of what she needs to raise to stay on track before March's critical mid-month fundraising deadline.** With Senate control split 50-50, every single seat is indispensable when it comes to protecting our Democratic majority. We are counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us fight back against GOP spending and help Abby win!
Remember this, Peter: If Abby defeats Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our majority in the Senate. Yet right now, we are being massively outraised by the GOP, so we need a surge in donations to hit this important goal for our campaign: >>>

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Thank you for joining Courtney Geels Campaign
body:
Hi Peter,
Thank you for your interest in supporting Courtney Geels for Congress!

It looks like you live in Pennsylvania. Since you live out of state, are you interested in phone banking? If so, please let me know and I will give you the next steps.

Brad Kirby is our Social Media Director. Please reach out to him at _[m](mailto:bkirby7@gmail.com)[edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)_ if you would like to help spread the word.

If you wish to be removed from this email list, please let me know.

If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Follow us on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/courtneygeels), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/courtneygeels/), and give us a like on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CourtneyGeelsForCongress) to keep up with Courtney.

Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Wendy Davis
subject: We can protect reproductive healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
The Fairness Project’s newest campaign, Michigan for Reproductive Freedom is a groundbreaking ballot measure — the first of its kind — and could set the stage to codify Roe v. Wade’s protections in states all across the country. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42897831/334784345/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGM3YWUwZS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gMYasQ1_WOtI7zsz-p_0Fo0d137Fw9g3PHTtu_wCjg=&emci=1e7d7988-41a1-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b0c7ae0e-27a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=561582) | Hi there, Almost 10 years ago, I stood on the floor of the Senate chamber in the Texas state capitol to filibuster a disastrous piece of legislation that would have devastated reproductive healthcare in the state of Texas. For more than 13 hours I stood. And while at times it was painful, I knew the discomfort I felt in that moment paled in comparison to the struggle people across the state would feel if this bill passed into law. The bill set unattainable and unnecessary physical standards for clinics to meet. _In the second-largest state in the country, that would mean closing 37 out of 42 clinics._ We stopped that bill temporarily, and when it ultimately did pass we didn’t stop fighting — successfully overturning it in the Supreme Court three years later. But that was then. Today, we continue to see an assault on reproductive rights in Texas and elsewhere around the country. And we’ve lost the protection the Supreme Court once afforded us, with many court watchers predicting that Roe v. Wade will be overturned in June of this year. **But friend, we still have a _real chance_ to codify reproductive rights and protect healthcare for years to come. ** The Fairness Project’s newest campaign, _Michigan for Reproductive Freedom_ is a groundbreaking ballot measure — the first of its kind — and could set the stage to codify Roe v. Wade’s protections in states all across the country. [_**But to win this campaign, they need our help. Will you make a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford right now to supercharge their efforts in Michigan?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42897832/334784373/143350260?refcode=E14473-20220312-WDSurrogate-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGM3YWUwZS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gMYasQ1_WOtI7zsz-p_0Fo0d137Fw9g3PHTtu_wCjg=) In the world we’re living in, codifying reproductive rights might feel unachievable. But friend, _I know the Fairness Project and their partners in Michigan can do it. _ They’ve won 23 campaigns to raise wages, expand health care, enact police reform, and guarantee paid leave in red, purple, and blue states — because Americans _everywhere_ agree with common-sense reforms that improve our lives. [_**So, friend, will you join me today in supporting the Fairness Project as they fight to win this groundbreaking initiative and set the stage for a new way to save reproductive health care in this country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42897833/334784401/143350260?refcode=E14473-20220312-WDSurrogate-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGM3YWUwZS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gMYasQ1_WOtI7zsz-p_0Fo0d137Fw9g3PHTtu_wCjg=) [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42897834/334784402/143350260?refcode=E14473-20220312-WDSurrogate-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGM3YWUwZS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gMYasQ1_WOtI7zsz-p_0Fo0d137Fw9g3PHTtu_wCjg=) Thanks for your help and much love,
Wendy Davis

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: I've got to share this with you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897927/334784870/-420428835?refcode=220312_SA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmYwODhjMS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NxWmSToez6NQ56xO2ljq90RMbwMsc8SPZ9MqlV7q2Bc=) Friend - I just got some urgent news I need to share with you: **FIRST** : CNN named me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection – in a race experts say will decide Senate control. **THEN** : Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves to smear me with attack ads, turn Georgia red and win back the majority for Mitch McConnell. **NOW: We set a $50,000 grassroots-response goal to fight back against these GOP attacks, but we're still falling short of the critical resources we need to win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority.** With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just _one_ seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. **I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first-ever Black senator and help lead the fight for our Democratic priorities – but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.** [**So I'm personally asking, friend: will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our grassroots-response deadline at midnight – to help close our budget gap, keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897928/334784871/-392698372?refcode=220312_SA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmYwODhjMS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NxWmSToez6NQ56xO2ljq90RMbwMsc8SPZ9MqlV7q2Bc=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897929/334784872/-420428835?refcode=220312_SA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmYwODhjMS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NxWmSToez6NQ56xO2ljq90RMbwMsc8SPZ9MqlV7q2Bc=)
Any missed goal stacks the deck against our communities, against our movement and against the progressive future we’ve worked tirelessly for. So thank you in advance for pitching in. \- Raphael [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897930/334784873/-420428835?refcode=220312_SA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmYwODhjMS0yN2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NxWmSToez6NQ56xO2ljq90RMbwMsc8SPZ9MqlV7q2Bc=)

name: Team Bremer
subject: Important update from Team Eli
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eli For Colorado

Hi friend, I’m Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks. **On this day last week, I was proud to endorse Wes Moore’s campaign to become the next Governor of Maryland.** I have seen Wes connect with people and bring them together to chart a vision for the future. It is clear that he has the vision, integrity, and the ability to move our state forward and deliver for families in Prince George’s County and across Maryland. I believe that Wes is the leader that we need in this moment, and I fully support his effort to be our next Governor. [**Will you join me in supporting Wes by making a grassroots donation to his campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42898139/334785882/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220312alsobrooks2_AA_60do_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYyMGViNi0yOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvJ9z2MYROoDhbeaEyAxJFnQikKyi_HAMFiLgSZVbic=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42898140/334785883/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220312alsobrooks2_AA_60do_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYyMGViNi0yOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvJ9z2MYROoDhbeaEyAxJFnQikKyi_HAMFiLgSZVbic=)
---
**From the first time we met, it was clear that Wes was sharp, empathetic, and had a true heart for the people. In my eyes, those are the makings of a true transformational leader.**
As County Executive, it is important to me to have someone in the Governor’s mansion who will be a real partner in helping to improve the lives of Prince Georgians. We need a Governor who will:
* restore our communities and our economy after COVID-19 has devastated so many of us for the past two years;
* prioritize funding for education to ensure that all of our children, regardless of their zip code, have access to a quality education;
* make our neighborhoods safer by focusing on reducing violent crime and getting illegal guns off of our streets;
* fight for environmental justice and innovative use of clean energy practices.

When I look at the range of Wes’s experience leading soldiers in combat, building and running a small business in Maryland, and being CEO of one of the largest anti-poverty organizations in America — **I know he is the leader Maryland needs in our next governor.**
Whether it is veteran, Rhodes Scholar, author, CEO, humanitarian, or his favorite titles — husband and father, Wes has dedicated his life to service and uplifting others.
[**I am proud to endorse my friend, Wes Moore, and look forward to the future of our great state. Let’s work together to make him the next Governor of Maryland: pitch in $10 or anything you can afford to fuel this movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42898141/334785884/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220312alsobrooks2_AA_60do_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYyMGViNi0yOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvJ9z2MYROoDhbeaEyAxJFnQikKyi_HAMFiLgSZVbic=)

clean_body: | = Hi friend, I’m Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks. On this day last week, I was proud to endorse Wes Moore’s campaign to become the next Governor of Maryland. I have seen Wes connect with people and bring them together to chart a vision for the future. It is clear that he has the vision, integrity, and the ability to move our state forward and deliver for families in Prince George’s County and across Maryland. I believe that Wes is the leader that we need in this moment, and I fully support his effort to be our next Governor. = | = From the first time we met, it was clear that Wes was sharp, empathetic, and had a true heart for the people. In my eyes, those are the makings of a true transformational leader. As County Executive, it is important to me to have someone in the Governor’s mansion who will be a real partner in helping to improve the lives of Prince Georgians. We need a Governor who will: restore our communities and our economy after COVID-19 has devastated so many of us for the past two years; prioritize funding for education to ensure that all of our children, regardless of their zip code, have access to a quality education; make our neighborhoods safer by focusing on reducing violent crime and getting illegal guns off of our streets; fight for environmental justice and innovative use of clean energy practices. When I look at the range of Wes’s experience leading soldiers in combat, building and running a small business in Maryland, and being CEO of one of the largest anti-poverty organizations in America — I know he is the leader Maryland needs in our next governor. Whether it is veteran, Rhodes Scholar, author, CEO, humanitarian, or his favorite titles — husband and father, Wes has dedicated his life to service and uplifting others. = **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Angela Alsobrooks Prince George’s County Executive | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Your Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59811538:J4_HVgEnN:m:1:3317145305:0DFF3BD91886CACA8690D407E41990A3:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59811539:J4_HVgEnN:m:1:3317145305:0DFF3BD91886CACA8690D407E41990A3:r)
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59811539:J4_HVgEnN:m:1:3317145305:0DFF3BD91886CACA8690D407E41990A3:r "Please click here to donate now")**

| **Calling All Boaters, Fisherman, Beach Lovers... This Invite Is For You!**

---
|
Hi Friend!

Join Amanda Makki for a Meet and Greet at Harbor Masters Tiki Bar! Come by land or sea -the Tiki Bar is located in the Bay Pines Marina. Mark your calendar for **Thursday, March 24th at 6 pm. **

[Send your RSVP now!](mailto:Nancy@AmandaMakki.com?subject=Count%20Me%20In%20for%20Amanda's%20Meet%20and%20Greet!)

See you there!

Team Makki

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Why infrastructure matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress
body:
---
| | It’s baffling to me that anyone would have voted against the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill. Investing in our infrastructure is CRITICAL to rebuilding our economy.

And yet, my Republican opponent Steve Chabot tried to _block_ the Infrastructure Bill -- even while local Republicans like Rob Portman and Mitch McConnell supported it.

Chabot voted AGAINST fixing roads, providing clean drinking water, and safe bridges.

**[Our district deserves a leader who works _for_ us, not _against_ us. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42899822/334793601/1092196856?refcode=20220312_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE0MzY4My0zMmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0L5c5qrC_QnaOr2tHvbqbTDOxwIP2z_65ZkiUxvyvAU=)**

**_[Chabot is going to have a ton of outside money to keep him in DC., but we have a growing grassroots community that will help us win in November. Our goal is to raise $3,256 by midnight. Can you chip in $15? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42899823/334793602/1092196856?refcode=20220312_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE0MzY4My0zMmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0L5c5qrC_QnaOr2tHvbqbTDOxwIP2z_65ZkiUxvyvAU=)_** I will always vote to invest in our economy and our region.

I fought to improve our local infrastructure, starting with Cincinnati's crumbling Western Hills Viaduct that serves as critical transit for 40,000 people every day.

And I helped dramatically improve our transportation system to connect people to good-paying jobs.

**_[Now I’m running for Congress to build big coalitions for big ideas that will help all Americans succeed. But a race this competitive is going to be expensive and I’m going to need all the help I can get to compete with Chabot’s outside cash. Can you help us reach our goal by chipping in $15 before midnight? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42899824/334793603/1092196856?refcode=20220312_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE0MzY4My0zMmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0L5c5qrC_QnaOr2tHvbqbTDOxwIP2z_65ZkiUxvyvAU=)_** | | [**Chip in $15 now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42899825/334793604/1092196856?refcode=20220312_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE0MzY4My0zMmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0L5c5qrC_QnaOr2tHvbqbTDOxwIP2z_65ZkiUxvyvAU=)

# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149414&L=81208&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9kdWN0cy40cGF0cmlvdHMuY29tL2Zvb2QvM21vbnRoL2JhY2staW4tc3RvY2s/dHJ2PTNobHBmbWJiOWh5OV9fMTI0MDJfXzE1NjgmQUZJRD0xMDk1JmFmZl9zdWI9MTcxOC0yMDIyMDMxMi1zMDQzYzEzMVQtQnVuZGxlMSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249RjRQLTE3MTgtMjAyMjAzMTItczA0M2MxMzFULUJ1bmRsZTEmcGliPSZwdWJpZD0=)
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.
Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".
**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.**
If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.
It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.
Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore.
Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores.
That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149414&L=81209&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazM0LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQwMiZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzEyLXMwNDNjMTMxVC1CdW5kbGUxJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1GNFAtMTcxOC0yMDIyMDMxMi1zMDQzYzEzMVQtQnVuZGxlMQ==).
Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. body:
Former Navy SEALs Eli Crane, Morgan Luttrell, Ryan Zinke & Derrick Van Orden are reaching out with a personal message. See below:

****** **Emergency Message********

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59811543:JAADwgEN_:m:1:3317145305:A95BA20A20768DCFA5A9249413DE84F5:r)

Former Navy SEALs Eli Crane, Morgan Luttrell, Ryan Zinke & Derrick Van Orden are reaching out with a personal message. **See below:**

"Each of our campaigns has received Devastating news today. This will be a disaster...

Nancy Pelosi, fearing she could lose her Majority and control over America in 2022, has personally intervened to back our opponents across the country with her $350 Million donor accounts. She wants to guarantee these elections become bought and paid-for Liberal Seats held by her puppet politicians.

Individually, Pelosi can Silence our campaigns, but together we are stronger than the Leftist Mob who want us Muzzled for supporting Trump in 2016 & in 2020.

The truth is, Peter, we're a group of veterans running for Congress to protect the American Dream, but to D.C. Swamp Creatures, we're a threat to their corruption & they'll do anything to keep us silent.

We're no strangers to adversity. We're American warriors--we won't give up in the face of overwhelming odds and will answer the call to protect America from radicals once again. Can Pelosi say the same?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Big week ahead for income tax elimination – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/incometaxelimination?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Mississippi is at a key moment. Do we eliminate the state income tax, and make our state more competitive, or do we carry on with the same economic approach that has left us trailing other southern states?

**Mississippi can afford to abolish the income tax. Our state budget has a record-breaking surplus. **

Eliminating the income tax would mean allowing ordinary workers in our state to keep more of their own earnings. It is not just good for the economy and affordable – it is also morally the right thing to do.

**It was wonderful to see almost 50 Mississippi business leaders sign a letter to the legislature in support of income tax elimination. **

This week Speaker Philip Gunn dropped into our studio to share his thoughts, too.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=08bf2d7f9c&e=5703353baa)
---
| If you are unsure what income tax elimination would mean for you, [check out our interactive tool.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1e36bc668d&e=5703353baa)
[](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3a7edd7dde&e=5703353baa)
---
| **Lets hope the House and Senate can reach agreement this week. If not, I hope they hold a special session.**

Those progressives that oppose income tax elimination need to stand up and explain why they believe politicians are better at spending Mississippi workers earnings than those Mississippians.

Have a great weekend!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2bd22ad296&e=5703353baa)
---
West must wake up on energy
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1e8eef4c2b&e=5703353baa)
---
Hattiesburg Kiwanis welcome Douglas
| |
---

name: Kara Hahn
subject: When I think of climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42881880/334723031/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2QyZDBiMC0wYWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37MUW6R7bEORkeVKJW-amxdt4RipgEnnwq1OsgrJJ6s=)

Team,

The first time I ever used a chainsaw was back in 1985, when I joined my dad and our community to clear our roads of fallen trees in the aftermath of Hurricane Gloria. It was a long time ago, but I still think of the destruction we had to dig out from, and the cost of that and other storms, like superstorm Sandy, when I consider the growing threat of climate change.

For some people, climate change may not feel like an immediate concern. But for us — living along a coastal area, with so many homes, lives and jobs tied to our beach communities and natural environment — climate change is a very real threat.

**It's one of the many reasons why we need to flip this seat blue, so that we can have a fighter for climate action representing New York's 1st.**

**[Look, I recognize the urgent need to combat climate change, and I'm running so that we can pull together and take real action while there’s still time. clean_body: | = Team, The first time I ever used a chainsaw was back in 1985, when I joined my dad and our community to clear our roads of fallen trees in the aftermath of Hurricane Gloria. It was a long time ago, but I still think of the destruction we had to dig out from, and the cost of that and other storms, like superstorm Sandy, when I consider the growing threat of climate change. For some people, climate change may not feel like an immediate concern. But for us — living along a coastal area, with so many homes, lives and jobs tied to our beach communities and natural environment — climate change is a very real threat. It's one of the many reasons why we need to flip this seat blue, so that we can have a fighter for climate action representing New York's 1st. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Right now, our representative in Washington isn't doing anything to protect our communities and our way of life from climate change. In fact, Zeldin has consistently stood in the way of initiatives to cut emissions, strengthen energy independence, and transition to clean power. His inaction has left us vulnerable to the fuel price spikes we're seeing right now, which disproportionately hurt working families. Long Islanders deserve better. I've spent decades fighting for our environment — to protect our beaches, reduce plastic pollution, ensure we have clean, safe water to drink, and help build green infrastructure. With the threat of climate change looming all around us, it's more important than ever to elect someone who is going to step up on these issues in Washington. = = Thank you once again — and stay warm! body:
Here's the latest - Jack Bergman drops $30k on Facebook ads for himself over just three weeks.| | | **Dr. Bob exposes misuse of taxpayer dollars — Bergman drops $30k on Facebook ads in three weeks. **
---
_** Congressional office holders have an advertising allowance to reach constituents. Expenses are approved by a bipartisan oversight committee, but Dr. Lorinser contends the First District Representative's latest ads are a gross misuse of taxpayer funds and go too far.**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882105/334724515/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=)
---
**In total, from Feb. 18 - Mar. 10, Michigan’s First District's Facebook page spent nearly $30,000 on ads that were neither informative nor educational. "These are campaign ads for Jack Bergman." — Dr. Lorinser**
---
[MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882106/334724516/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882107/334724517/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=)
---
WASHINGTON, DC. — Congresspeople need to reach constituents about essential details relating to their work, like how to get emergency relief funds after a natural disaster or changes to social security payments. There are allowances for each office to advertise appropriately about legislative happenings in DC. This money is not intended to campaign, but the line is thinning and blurring, and Congresspeople on both sides of the aisle take unfair advantage. Expenses are currently legal and approved by a bipartisan oversight committee, but Dr. Bob Lorinser disagrees with the content of Bergman's latest social ads. "This isn't constituent engagement," said Dr. Lorinser. "These are campaign ads. It's a disgusting waste of money for taxpayers and an unfair windfall to the incumbent. We desperately need campaign finance reform in this country, and this type of ethical corner-cutting is a component I intend to combat when in Congress. The content of these ads needs serious scrutiny." One of Bergman's ads — on which he spent an estimated $15,500 of taxpayer funds since Feb. 18 — states, "Biden is considering a policy offering your money to illegal border crossers. Follow my page." Dr. Lorinser [debunked this claim](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882108/334724518/20414814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=&emci=dc4447dc-09a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7b9b3caa-0ca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) last year.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Compared to the $30,000 spent by his office in the last 20 days, [Bergman’s campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882109/334724519/474536012?active_status=all&ad_type=political_and_issue_ads&country=US&view_all_page_id=1711390915783604&sort_data\[direction\]=desc&sort_data\[mode\]=relevancy_monthly_grouped&search_type=page&media_type=all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=&emci=dc4447dc-09a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7b9b3caa-0ca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) spent only $2.5k (est.) since Dr. Lorinser entered the race last August, highlighting that the Congressman appears to be substituting campaign-spends with taxpayer-advertising because of the election year. Lorinser urges taxpayers to demand his opponent's campaign reimburse them for the unethical behavior, even if technically legal. "He can use his corporate PAC money obtained from out of the state to fund his campaign, but not our money." Lorinser says the Congressman is likely counting on voters not knowing, but the public can review all political candidates' Meta ads and expenses [on the ad library](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882110/334724520/474536012?active_status=all&ad_type=political_and_issue_ads&country=US&id=958466181711001&view_all_page_id=1714470218843866&search_type=page&media_type=all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=&emci=dc4447dc-09a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7b9b3caa-0ca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) at [fb.com/adlibrary](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882111/334724521/474536012?active_status=all&ad_type=political_and_issue_ads&country=US&id=958466181711001&view_all_page_id=1714470218843866&search_type=page&media_type=all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=&emci=dc4447dc-09a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7b9b3caa-0ca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427). "The more I see and learn about my opponent, the more upset I get," said Dr. Lorinser. "I first noticed his immoral behavior when he claimed residency here because of a seasonal address in the UP. Louisiana is his home. Although it meets the letter of the law to be our Representative, it does not fit within ethical standards of most of people in the First District. "Let's bring back the best of who we are to the First District. Let's elect a Representative who really lives here and who will spend taxpayer dollars responsibly." PS: This message is paid for by the Friends of Dr. Bob for Congress campaign.

But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message. Manny Vigil is a retired member of the United States Air Force. The use of military or diplomatic rank, job title, and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement for Dr. Lorinser by the U.S. State Department, Department of the Air Force, or the Department of Defense. I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. If you make any contribution (including any purchase) on or through the services, your payment information (e.g., credit or debit card type, number, and expiration date) and related information (e.g., physical address) may be collected by us and/or our third-party payment processors. To comply with Federal election law and the regulations of the Federal Election Commission, we are required to do our best to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 per election cycle. Generally, contributions are non-refundable. Should you choose to contribute, you will receive an e-mail confirmation of your contribution. C. Information You Choose to Provide to Us. We collect any information you provide to us on or through the services or in any other way. For example, we collect any information you provide when you update your user account and profile ("User Account"); participate in contests, surveys, and other promotions; and sign up to receive newsletters and other communications. In addition, the Services may include features that rely on the use of information stored on, or made available through, your mobile device. We may also ask to collect or use the specific location of your mobile device (e.g., by accessing your Device's GPS). If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at [google.com/privacy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42882114/334724524/-1896877334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjliM2NhYS0wY2EyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PH-C4Ux-ocLiOcI0o1eHdT-6DxS2iK74MmQTbHRrcuA=&emci=dc4447dc-09a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7b9b3caa-0ca2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427). D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. We may collect any information you submit, post, or provide in such activities and reserve the right to store any information about the people you contact via the Services. PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
