If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at . D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. We may collect any information you submit, post, or provide in such activities and reserve the right to store any information about the people you contact via the Services. PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our upcoming deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
In less than three weeks, we will come to the end of our financial quarter, the very first one of 2022. As you probably know, this is an extremely important deadline for us. **The end of the quarter should mark a period of strong fundraising, so that we can prove how successful our movement is. **
I don’t accept a dime of money from special interests or corporate PACs. I don’t believe in the corrupting influence of money in politics. I believe in people power. **And that’s why my campaign is 100% funded by individual people, from the grassroots up. **
Supporters like you drive our campaign. Without your investment, this campaign would go nowhere. But thankfully, **we owe our success and the strength of our movement to thousands of people like yourself who have chipped in along the way. **
**[Now I’m asking you to join them and donate to my campaign today. Consider starting a monthly recurring donation HERE so you can sustain my campaign for the long run>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900247/334795936/1232707546?refcode=3-13&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmVhMjRiNC0zNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrHCwGdA5DWzc7K-p3bOB2urn-cX2XHRUMJ7BhY2oEE=)**

I’ll keep this email short, because I value your time. Just remember this: if my Republican opponent stays in power, one seat like his could make the difference in the House turning red during the midterm elections. **If we succeed in flipping this district blue, we’ll save Democrats one more seat in our defense against the Republicans this year. **
California’s 23rd district is on the frontlines of our battle to maintain the Democratic majority in the House. **Donors like you who contribute to our campaign are helping to invest in a race that has a real shot of making a difference for the control of power in Congress. **
**[Will you contribute to my campaign by starting a monthly donation that will keep us going through Election Day? Winning this race will take all of us. **Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

We’ve witnessed unprecedented crises through COVID-19, global inflation, and even an unprovoked invasion in Ukraine that demanded the strongest possible response without dragging us into another war. And time and time again, the president has stepped up to the challenge — strategizing swiftly and carefully to avoid chaos. We couldn’t have had a better leader today to answer the 3 a.m. phone call. = Despite the far-right’s divisive attacks against the Biden administration, the president is working to unite the country and defend our allies. | _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

subject: National Working Moms Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900956/334799148/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlhZjAxYS0zOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SWXWR7ndilQ2LL2eOJmSRn4iY4KYjjRv2Fj3Isdfx2o=&emci=2a3db4a1-36a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2b9af01a-39a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=23594672)
---
| | |
---
Peter, today is National Working Mom’s Day and I’m proud to celebrate all of the mom’s around the country. Working mom’s make up over 1/3rd of all employed women and even those who aren’t working are still raising children – which as many of us know, is a job in itself. **[Can you rush a donation of $23 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900957/334799149/-804235033?refcode=em0312&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlhZjAxYS0zOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SWXWR7ndilQ2LL2eOJmSRn4iY4KYjjRv2Fj3Isdfx2o=)** We’ll explain more below.
---
[**RUSH $23 NOW →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900958/334799150/-804235033?refcode=em0312&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlhZjAxYS0zOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SWXWR7ndilQ2LL2eOJmSRn4iY4KYjjRv2Fj3Isdfx2o=)
---
Working moms are the core of our country, the shapers of future generations, the faces of history. Yet, working mothers make less than men in the same position, are usually not provided with paid parental leave, have to find childcare, are expected to drop everything if their kid is sick (but made to look weak when they do), and so much more. **The average mom earns only $47,000 annually, about $23 hourly, and earns $0.71 to a man's $1.00.** That’s a loss of $16,000 in a year. Meanwhile, fathers make about 20% more than men without children do. The average cost of childcare is $10,000 yearly,**making up over 20% of the average mom's salary.** This is a huge reason why moms end up leaving the job force, working part time, or moving to more “family friendly” firms. Women are expected to dramatically shift their lives after birth, while men do not suffer consequences but rather get raises and promotions. I know exactly how hard it is to be a mom in the workforce. I know just how expensive childcare is because I couldn’t afford it. I know the struggle to give birth and go back to work immediately because we aren’t given paid parental leave. All of these struggles can be fixed. When I’m elected I will fight to extend the child tax credit, close the wage gap, increase funding to our childcare facilities, and give moms the paid parental leave that we more than deserve. I will always fight for women, moms, and our children. **[But I need your help. I am asking you today to donate $23 to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900959/334799151/-804235033?refcode=em0312&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlhZjAxYS0zOWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SWXWR7ndilQ2LL2eOJmSRn4iY4KYjjRv2Fj3Isdfx2o=)** **Marjorie Taylor Greene isn’t standing up for working moms, in fact she’s pushing us backwards.** We need to elect representatives that fight for the people, and that’s exactly why I need your support. Talk soon,Holly McCormack.
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, today is National Working Mom’s Day and I’m proud to celebrate all of the mom’s around the country. Working mom’s make up over 1/3rd of all employed women and even those who aren’t working are still raising children – which as many of us know, is a job in itself. = We’ll explain more below. = Working moms are the core of our country, the shapers of future generations, the faces of history. Yet, working mothers make less than men in the same position, are usually not provided with paid parental leave, have to find childcare, are expected to drop everything if their kid is sick (but made to look weak when they do), and so much more. The average mom earns only $47,000 annually, about $23 hourly, and earns $0.71 to a man's $1.00. That’s a loss of $16,000 in a year. Meanwhile, fathers make about 20% more than men without children do. The average cost of childcare is $10,000 yearly,making up over 20% of the average mom's salary. This is a huge reason why moms end up leaving the job force, working part time, or moving to more “family friendly” firms. Women are expected to dramatically shift their lives after birth, while men do not suffer consequences but rather get raises and promotions. I know exactly how hard it is to be a mom in the workforce. I know just how expensive childcare is because I couldn’t afford it. I know the struggle to give birth and go back to work immediately because we aren’t given paid parental leave. All of these struggles can be fixed. When I’m elected I will fight to extend the child tax credit, close the wage gap, increase funding to our childcare facilities, and give moms the paid parental leave that we more than deserve. I will always fight for women, moms, and our children. = Marjorie Taylor Greene isn’t standing up for working moms, in fact she’s pushing us backwards. We need to elect representatives that fight for the people, and that’s exactly why I need your support. Talk soon,Holly McCormack. | | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: John Fetterman
subject: Gisele took this photo, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Politics is often ugly, but being a dad reminds you why it matters so much to get it right.
#
So, Gisele took this photo of my seven-year-old son August and I earlier this week.
I tweeted it out, but I wanted to make sure you saw it, Derek.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45304?refcode=em20220312-4935&t=1&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)
Just me and Nugget, one of my biggest fans, holding a sign that means the world to me. 🤩
Increasingly, politics is often ugly. These past few years have been no exception. But being a dad, on the other hand, reminds you why it matters so much to get it right.
**There's *so* much at stake right now.** >From making sure families can afford to keep a roof over their heads and their kids fed, to tackling the climate crisis, to finally curbing the epidemic of gun violence on our streets and in our schools.
I've always remained in public office because I believe in the work. I believe in the issues. And I believe in our power to tangibly improve the lives of families no matter their ZIP code. Always have, and always will.
**So here's my promise to you, Derek: If elected to the Senate, I'll fight as hard for you and your family as I do for my own.** And when it comes time to vote on the most important issues facing our country, I'll always cast my vote in the Senate with our kids and our future generations in mind.
If that sounds like something you'd want in a leader, I've gotta make a quick ask of you before you close this email. **[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to support our campaign for all 67 counties in Pennsylvania? Every bit helps.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45304?refcode=em20220312-4935&t=2&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45304?amount=5&refcode=em20220312-4935&t=21&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)**
__
Thank you for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. Okay, I *know* this email was sappier than usual, Derek. But I mean it when I say that what's at stake in elections like ours is never clearer to me than when Gisele and I look at our own three kiddos. **[Fighting for a future that works for our families today and in the future is gonna take the right leadership, so if you can spare even a few bucks today, it'd make a big difference for our grassroots campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45304?refcode=em20220312-4935&t=22&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220312-4935-footer&t=23&refcode2=4935_434096_3WqnWl&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4935%2E434096%2E3WqnWl)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| Peter,
Right now, in many places around the world, government tyranny is going unchecked.
Politicians are ignoring the rights of citizens, and are instead forcing them to comply with burdensome mandates, restrictions, and regulations.
It's what happens when these politicians get too much unchecked power... They use it more and more until our freedom is GONE!
Since that's what we have in Nevada right now - with Sisolak and Single-Party Rule having total control in Carson City - it's important we speak out before it's too late...

Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

Thousands of grassroots supporters. 108 days until our June 28 primary election. 91 donations left to meet our mid-month goal and keep us organizing for victory! Please, will you pitch in $5, $10, $25, or the most generous amount you can to our mid-month goal so Jazz can be the effective, progressive voice we need in Congress fighting for healthcare for every person, nutritious food for every neighborhood, and the reforms we need to our unjust and often predatory criminal justice system? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Give $5 » [] Give $10 » [] Give $25 » [] Give $50 » [] Give $100 » [] Give Other » [] - Team Jazz Jazz Lewis [] Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son. CONTRIBUTE » [] Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis Friends of Jazz Lewis P.O. name: Never Again PAC
subject: We are calling on Congress to work for the people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We saw the damage that dark money and shady special interests can do when they empowered Donald Trump into defrauding the entire nation in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42901111/334799958/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0MzgyZmRmLTNiYTItZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KXxR8NwVM3BxRsRRLuc5ETjGydrQ-sbYE7_sYu0kNpc=&emci=f074dbbc-d59f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a4382fdf-3ba2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team,

We are a government of the people, by the people, and for the people — **not** for big corporations, demagogues, and special interests. But sadly, dark money has been allowed to infiltrate Washington since the _Citizens United_ decision in 2010.

We saw the damage that dark money and shady special interests can do when Donald Trump attempted to overturn the 2020 election. Conservative special interests and a wave of dark money fueled his misinformation campaign and led to the insurrection on January 6. Lack of accountability breeds corruption, and corruption breeds insurrections.

That's why today, we are calling on Congress to:
* Reduce big money in politics by establishing more accountability;
* Root corruption out of Washington;
* And more!

Why? Because we believe it can be done if we work together. With too much money and too many special interests in Washington, D.C., politicians need to be working for the people they represent and it's up to us to hold them accountable.

[**Add your name now to demand Congress reform our democracy. From: Scott Baugh <[info@baughforcongress.com](mailto:info@baughforcongress.com)>

| | Peter,

I just got off the phone with my team who let us know that with just 8 months left to go in this race, we are falling perilously behind Katie Porter when it comes to having the dollars needed to win.

In fact, if we don’t raise another $2,400 in the next 24 hours, we’re going to have to cut critical budget items–including those that are funding our outreach to undecided voters!

This would be a critical misstep that could endanger our entire campaign. Please, will you help us make up our deficit?

name: Team DeSantis
subject: We are paying the price
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7487ab6f2d1b7263b3c9c1bddfd05477fcda59ea049b6d88ed26bb2f855019cf73c47247acac5ab8e571e73c207a7ecf050079e8f2b76172856041b4af20561d6416ce2384bbf1fe

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=060c750495e2d341d9e0a24d37960fb8693e2590eec0394d222741bd51324193aece034c6337072f6b9d1795876ea672000f0bd52c640d86

Gas prices have officially reached HISTORIC highs... all thanks to the Biden administration.

Floridians are reeling from this administration’s catastrophic failures, and it is hitting them where it hurts – their wallets. Across the country, gas prices have skyrocketed as a direct result of Joe Biden’s pandering to the radical wing of his party.

Make no mistake: this is a deliberate attempt by radical left-wing socialists to eliminate American energy in favor of their disastrous Green New Deal policies.

Biden’s kowtowing to extremist Democrats has left America dependent on foreign energy, and now we are paying the price at the pump.

Instead of producing energy in America, the Biden administration would rather enable thugs who hate America in places like Venezuela and Iran. Simply changing the nation of origin for energy production does nothing to achieve their “Green Energy” ambitions, but it exports our dollars to other countries as they prop up brutal regimes and undermine American security.

Governor DeSantis was right to point out Biden’s blatant hypocrisy: “The Maduro regime is not a regime that you prop up. The Biden Administration doesn’t lift a finger to protect democracy for protestors in Cuba, but they’re more than happy to legitimize a murderous tyrant in Venezuela. In Florida, we will always stand with the people in Venezuela who want a free society, and we must immediately stop kneecapping American energy and tap into our energy reserves in this country.”

Biden is failing on all fronts. Not only have gas prices risen exponentially, but we are also seeing high prices when purchasing cars, homes, and food at the grocery store. After a little over a year in office, Joe Biden has negatively impacted the daily lives of the everyday Floridian.

But while Biden is floundering in D.C., Governor DeSantis is fighting back at every opportunity to protect the people of Florida from this administration’s failing policies.

Luckily for us in Florida, Governor DeSantis is a fighter. He has stood up to the radical Democrats and the Biden Administration when it counts because he has always put the best interest of Floridians first.

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=060c750495e2d341d9e0a24d37960fb8693e2590eec0394d222741bd51324193aece034c6337072f6b9d1795876ea672000f0bd52c640d86
ACT NOW

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor.

name: Kevin Ralph, Fundraising Director
subject: Your $5 will make a direct impact today — here’s how →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This statewide rally is how we’ll be able to rack up votes for Morgan.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220312-780-footer-ak&t=2&akid=780%2E90090%2EMCZ5XY)
With just weeks left before our May 3 primary election, we’re excited to kick off Organizing Rallies for Morgan across the state! [Click here to support our organizing team with a $5 contribution.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29518?refcode=em20220312-780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=780%2E90090%2EMCZ5XY)
These rallies are how we’ll be able to rack up votes for Morgan — by recruiting volunteers and introducing Morgan to as many voters as possible between now and the election. Funding rallies across the state takes a **massive amount of resources,** but they are critical to our strategy to win. Every dollar we can raise is another voter we can share Morgan’s message with. We can’t let momentum stall.
That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. **A $5 contribution from you would make a huge impact on how many cities Morgan is able to visit over the next few weeks** — allowing us to connect directly with people who already support the campaign, introduce new voters to Morgan, and win the support of people who are on the fence.
[So what do you say — can we count on your $5 contribution today to fund our Statewide Organizing Rallies?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29518?refcode=em20220312-780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=780%2E90090%2EMCZ5XY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29518?refcode=em20220312-780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=780%2E90090%2EMCZ5XY)**
We know voters in this state want universal healthcare, reproductive rights, and economic opportunity — they just need to hear Morgan’s message on these issues. Each new supporter we win over is one more person we’ve secured to vote for Morgan in the primary election.
[To make sure we contact the number of voters we need to win, we need everyone reading this to help. Please make your $5 contribution now to ensure Morgan can visit as many cities across the state as possible »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29518?refcode=em20220312-780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=780%2E90090%2EMCZ5XY)
Thank you so much for your support today,
Kevin
Fundraising Director
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220312-780-footer&t=25&refcode2=780_90090_MCZ5XY&akid=780%2E90090%2EMCZ5XY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)

subject: Psaki’s Response to Your Rising Gas Prices?
body:
Buy an electric car!
| |

| | As gas prices soar and families struggle to keep up with rising inflation, White House Press Secretary **Jen Psaki suggested Americans look into buying electric cars.** When pressed on whether the President himself drove an electric vehicle, Psaki couldn’t answer. _**Rules for thee and not for me...**_

name: Ryan (Team Demings)
subject: Val Demings will make us proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Today, on her birthday, I'd love to tell you why
| | |
---
Friend,

I wake up every morning and fight to elect Val Demings because I know she'll make my family, my friends and my home state of Florida proud. **Today, on her birthday, I'd love to tell you why.**
The first time Val Demings ran for Congress, I was working at a Democratic Party committee writing about upcoming political leaders, and she was one of the only Black women on our radar that cycle. It also meant a lot to me that she is from Florida like I am.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42901649/334805306/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2609-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTJmY2RjNC0zZmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJf__g-o-2v3owDEonP5lFfV2qUkXxOgoZCW-eMRgOA=)
Researching Val Demings more, I learned that she dedicated her life to service, working as a police officer for 27 years. I was so impressed that she extended her love for her community through her police work – just as my cousin Robin did for the Jacksonville Sheriff's Office when I was younger.
So, as soon as I learned about Val Demings' dedication to our state, I knew right away that I had to work for her in some capacity. It's been my dream since I was growing up to show the world that you can be Black and from somewhere like Jacksonville and accomplish big things. Val Demings has proven exactly that to folks like me.
When Chief Demings is elected to the Senate, her election won't just expand our Senate majority, it will have a very real impact on Black kids in Duval County Public Schools and at colleges like Florida State University – and it will make Floridians of all political backgrounds proud to have a senator who _never tires_ of fighting for them.
**No one knows better than I do that this race will be a challenge. Val Demings is up against Republicans with deep pockets who are spending millions in attack ads against her. It's going to take all hands on deck to overcome that kind of spending, but I know that we can make Florida proud if we work together.**
**[I'm giving everything I have to this race, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, deliver better leadership to the people of Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42901650/334805307/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2609-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTJmY2RjNC0zZmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJf__g-o-2v3owDEonP5lFfV2qUkXxOgoZCW-eMRgOA=)**
Thanks for joining this grassroots team,

Ryan
Deputy Campaign Manager
Team Demings

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: this little girl has no clue
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

The little girl in this photo has no clue what a wild ride life has in store for her. Right now, all she knows is the joy of weekend camping with her family, tearing into her mom’s homemade meatballs, and begging her dad to buy her a dirt bike.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-ccm-mar22?refcode=em220312-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2307_6688874_4VJ6Bk&akid=2307%2E6688874%2E4VJ6Bk)
Her dad raised her on three principles: work hard, be honest, and respect everyone. She spent her life watching him pour his heart into bettering his community, and she became a first-generation college graduate and pursued a career in law to protect that community.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-ccm-mar22?refcode=em220312-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2307_6688874_4VJ6Bk&akid=2307%2E6688874%2E4VJ6Bk)
She went on to be elected Nevada’s Attorney General just as the 2008 financial crisis wreaked havoc on America’s middle-class families and our economy. She took on the Big Banks with a fellow Attorney General from California and secured $1.9 billion in relief for Nevada homeowners.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-ccm-mar22?refcode=em220312-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2307_6688874_4VJ6Bk&akid=2307%2E6688874%2E4VJ6Bk)
In 2016, she would make history as the first woman from Nevada and first Latina ever elected to the United States Senate. The odds were stacked against her, and many said she had no chance of winning. Mitch McConnell and the GOP spent nearly $50 million to defeat her, but her grassroots team stood by her every step of the way.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-ccm-mar22?refcode=em220312-1-7&t=4&refcode2=2307_6688874_4VJ6Bk&akid=2307%2E6688874%2E4VJ6Bk)
Friend, my story is one of community. It made me who I am today and it’s why I fight so hard for Nevada in the Senate. But I was just declared “the most vulnerable Democratic Senator” in the entire country, and Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate is leading me by 3 points in the polls.
[**Can you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly's right now to help me defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent and defend the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-ccm-mar22?refcode=em220312-1-7&t=5&refcode2=2307_6688874_4VJ6Bk&akid=2307%2E6688874%2E4VJ6Bk)
From college, to the courtroom, to the U.S. Senate — people have doubted that a Latina could compete and overcome the odds to win. I’ve proven them wrong every time, and I know that with your help, I can do it again.
My race will be one of the closest in the country and Nevada will be crucial for control of the Senate. GOP outside groups have already spent over $4 million to defeat me and flip the one seat they need to take back the Senate.
[**Friend, I need your help to close this polling gap and defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent. clean_body: The little girl in this photo has no clue what a wild ride life has in store for her. Right now, all she knows is the joy of weekend camping with her family, tearing into her mom’s homemade meatballs, and begging her dad to buy her a dirt bike. Her dad raised her on three principles: work hard, be honest, and respect everyone. She spent her life watching him pour his heart into bettering his community, and she became a first-generation college graduate and pursued a career in law to protect that community. She went on to be elected Nevada’s Attorney General just as the 2008 financial crisis wreaked havoc on America’s middle-class families and our economy. She took on the Big Banks with a fellow Attorney General from California and secured $1.9 billion in relief for Nevada homeowners. In 2016, she would make history as the first woman from Nevada and first Latina ever elected to the United States Senate. The odds were stacked against her, and many said she had no chance of winning. Mitch McConnell and the GOP spent nearly $50 million to defeat her, but her grassroots team stood by her every step of the way. Friend, my story is one of community. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Censored
body:
If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4pvb0iqernm552ftm7t7oodu41s159accjnjkog_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chi6aoj4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4d3169rm6p3megojaodim1q79olkc3h30tb7mpr34ctkmjin2pb6eio78olgesrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5ddgs1r6aphksipm8dtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs95a4ji473qpa5o9q5puobv3l4nk58l6acgcbe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chi6aoj4clh2bs) | |
---
Friend,

If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them.

But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore.

**That's because Facebook is suppressing our content.**

Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year:
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zieg167q4t4bv2psk4i8e2ivh18huse829p27kbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chi6aoj4clh2bs)
Despite our growing audience—we have many more followers now than we did a year ago—we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it.

In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach — they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone:
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc15k0c9dc9o5h6dai2kh0cb1j1feil46vpnkq3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chi6aoj4clh2bs)
We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town.

Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one.

The silence speaks volumes.

So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change.

But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you.

[**As someone who values free speech, I’m asking you to consider becoming a subscriber to the Babylon Bee today. By becoming a subscriber, you reduce our dependence on Big Tech and ensure we'll continue to have a presence and a platform, whether Facebook likes it or not.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3083660hv5b5irp68q6kvco2vt2e1korc63bgao_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chi6aoj4clh2bs)
[**Subscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhg5es7crc10hv10o7t5174s7fo59bghc3fondvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7chi6aoj4clh2bs)
Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that!

Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner.

Seth Dillon
CEO
|
---

_Copyright © 2020 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._

body:
Peter, Joe Biden is leading America down a dangerous path.

From forcing our citizens to get vaccines against their will to falling asleep while our enemies get stronger, every time the Biden Administration has been tested, they’ve failed miserably.

**We need to show the world that America won’t sit by idly while Joe Biden runs our country into the mud.**

The truth is, Joe Biden doesn’t represent the hard work and strong will of the American people.

subject: trying not to panic

body:

At the end of the month, we have to report our fundraising numbers to the
Federal Election Commission where they’ll be made PUBLIC—we need a strong
showing to fend off national Republicans and pull off a win.

What’s got me panicked is that our fundraising has been lagging behind all
month, and if we don’t raise $45,000 by the 15th, the deficit might be too
big to overcome.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8667?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2729%2E3611125%2EVoU32x ]Will you donate toward our mid-month goal to help us close the gap and

body:
Because the truth to keeping kids home and country locked down was NEVER ABOUT SCIENCE. | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=786112ef73bd47cbb7b27ba1ba707a89&_e=x8q1E4mSeermPI9jpcHe-985nuQ09hSic9P6agRV0UDggkvpfOM64O4jK-8OCBPRONb4-CwHOPf6lSDgM-C3O-Kh95aoafoilkPjM0hVnoaNWkbDt2x6l-5uKN-mrtgjw1oY4Qz2GCnek0BHZN-hOGBQ_AT_hTZ8zSwZ5aUBURRpQ5j5pRYrgftPYyDowZjQzLsMik8FNUaghYc0_dTOmXzoG0rCGzwOTniiIZEtBfcsHPdrK-HGL4D2FspQ-H9yAKbO8kD3Jq2Rnm4NT59YwGiRFvheVoPWPEdkCH3FwPqa2YgoL_-m981MVE8DOFzfOWuYEePpFSs2UOySkovwnR-QLNjUbbDVMWqy-2o4r7Eox4GcQIYJqh55Nsa0THgWl7QhJbAVkkpN4e0KQIf90VsyHvy193QM8j8rwhIxUavF5y2fb7YIJELxM8xX84bVUmmlkTi_scLI79kZVf4NvQ%3D%3D) | Peter,

It’s been OVER TWO YEARS that the Democrat leaders have **_LIED_** to parents, **_kept their kids at home_** and in masks - and the parents DESERVE AN APOLOGY.

[**THE DEMOCRATS LIED- DEMAND THEY APOLOGIZE TO PARENTS!

ADD YOUR NAME➔**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=786112ef73bd47cbb7b27ba1ba707a89&_e=x8q1E4mSeermPI9jpcHe-985nuQ09hSic9P6agRV0UDggkvpfOM64O4jK-8OCBPRONb4-CwHOPf6lSDgM-C3O-Kh95aoafoilkPjM0hVnoaNWkbDt2x6l-5uKN-mrtgjw1oY4Qz2GCnek0BHZN-hOGBQ_AT_hTZ8zSwZ5aUBURRpQ5j5pRYrgftPYyDowZjQzLsMik8FNUaghYc0_dTOmXzoG0rCGzwOTniiIZEtBfcsHPdrK-HGL4D2FspQ-H9ydTA5TW9itQ6HvDHCSRnN-QQEpYGuieo1bXl9tAUcZXH-SSfIwZFSyeUBnqFNxsXKK9ATSG2-Pd4wLS9GZauGpZJ4uMU68Br1kly1PaB688H8TnxwDDgXkIvU40bHGqztkw8ZMNzbaSJp_V-BChy2sTaqIg0Z0twZAMfYp9HRFYztLzdMAF20GvGRH0wK0WOUsj35t6tNGVEvFgkBcelTNA%3D%3D)
Parents will NEVER FORGET what Dr. Fauci and the Democrats told them:
* WE JUST NEEDED TO **FLATTEN THE CURVE**
* IT WOULD **ONLY BE TWO WEEKS**
* SCHOOLS WOULD BE **REOPENED QUICKLY**

And what really happened? Two weeks of lockdowns became one month, which became one year, and when parents started to speak up – they WERE BERATED at town halls by Democrat leaders and in some cases school boards called in the NATIONAL GUARD to keep PARENTS OUT.

[**Parents DESERVE AN APOLOGY.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=786112ef73bd47cbb7b27ba1ba707a89&_e=x8q1E4mSeermPI9jpcHe-985nuQ09hSic9P6agRV0UDggkvpfOM64O4jK-8OCBPRONb4-CwHOPf6lSDgM-C3O-Kh95aoafoilkPjM0hVnoaNWkbDt2x6l-5uKN-mrtgjw1oY4Qz2GCnek0BHZN-hOGBQ_AT_hTZ8zSwZ5aUBURRpQ5j5pRYrgftPYyDowZjQzLsMik8FNUaghYc0_dTOmXzoG0rCGzwOTniiIZEtBfcsHPdrK-HGL4D2FspQ-H9yCh87gKw3a6dMy-C5iLLyS9yM3RDcfzmAMJ2gqTjA4RprgGYDaqEkg-dAQaYehE4IvQVUYKJtUuKD1kaUq35clGumJhbli3J035QANIEeE00z_O0k4ujJW6tZXPFqsMKDfNCHlEtzIAPitajjv8tVtoQAZ6VrLBJ4sS5zSKxh_qMZOjdF8wY2a0qdqh7gCKLVdySM75xWEpDcPr3q5qwRqQ%3D%3D)

Because the truth to keeping kids home and country locked down was NEVER ABOUT SCIENCE. **IT WAS ABOUT THE DEMOCRATS DOING WHATEVER THEY NEEDED IN ORDER TO WIN THE 2020 ELECTION.**

We are going to make sure that those responsible for LYING AND BERATING PARENTS WHEN THEY SPOKE UP are held accountable. And the first order of business is making sure parents - the backbone of our country - are given the apology they deserve by Dr. Fauci and the top Democrat leaders.

[**THE DEMOCRATS LIED- DEMAND THEY APOLOGIZE TO PARENTS!

ADD YOUR NAME➔**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=786112ef73bd47cbb7b27ba1ba707a89&_e=x8q1E4mSeermPI9jpcHe-985nuQ09hSic9P6agRV0UDggkvpfOM64O4jK-8OCBPRONb4-CwHOPf6lSDgM-C3O-Kh95aoafoilkPjM0hVnoaNWkbDt2x6l-5uKN-mrtgjw1oY4Qz2GCnek0BHZN-hOGBQ_AT_hTZ8zSwZ5aUBURRpQ5j5pRYrgftPYyDowZjQzLsMik8FNUaghYc0_dTOmXzoG0rCGzwOTniiIZEtBfcsHPdrK-HGL4D2FspQ-H9yJxsbPi6gjffLilfY6mG2sebayCoAZl1vu9MUH2mgErsJOta4v6JZkQbiHrAbCgtOg4blyItZZGd9qEZQS9IiipfXSrzqdDIc4bZsZifAUinQcRjIaOH2ie2wrIC-QP0wQCBuOBcALsUgVbbNa38gCusjc5Pmp_cRBXQagrx7FSwsp1sojB5crmr-2KeRCRy9oPeEygE9BSNnNWYAua-vHQ%3D%3D)
Parents have been lied to and we will NEVER FORGET.

Add your name and demand Dr. Fauci and top Democrat leaders apologize. This is the first step in holding those accountable for using our children as political pawns in order to win back the White House.

Thanks,
Ed Rollins

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Reminder: It's a Call To Service
body:
Not for personal gain...
---
| | | | | | Volume 33 | March 9, 2022
---
|
---
| Public office is a call to service...
---
| | |
---|---
|
Public office is a call to service, and one who is elected to office should put the needs of the constituency before any personal gain.

But that's not what my Democratic opponent is the 7th Congressional District is doing. As a Colorado State Senator, she has been a member of the Senate Finance Committee, Colorado Health Insurance Exchange Joint Oversight Committee, and the Joint Study Committee on Opioid and Other Substance Use Disorders. She also served as vice chair of the Transportation and Energy Committee.

But the Democrats have cleared the decks of her responsibilities so she can run for the 7th CD, rather than doing the job she was elected to do.

Likewise, her social media presence has turned away from her Colorado Senate constituents and toward courting the voters of CO-07. She doesn't care about her constituents; she simply is looking for the next rung on the political ladder she's climbing.

I never designed my life to run for office--to me it is a call to duty. As your next U.S Congressman from Colorado I pledge my undivided support to solving the issues impacting you.
|

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week, Erik attended his precinct caucus as he hopes you did also.

Later in the week, he spoke to the Broomfield Caucus and Assembly.

Outside of these GOP Party activities, Erik provided interviews on radio and podcasts. You can visit our website to hear recordings of his appearances on Patriot State Radio, George Brauchler's show and Dan Caplis' show on KNUS. clean_body: Not for personal gain... | | | | | | Volume 33 | March 9, 2022 | | Public office is a call to service... | | | ---|--- | Public office is a call to service, and one who is elected to office should put the needs of the constituency before any personal gain. But that's not what my Democratic opponent is the 7th Congressional District is doing. As a Colorado State Senator, she has been a member of the Senate Finance Committee, Colorado Health Insurance Exchange Joint Oversight Committee, and the Joint Study Committee on Opioid and Other Substance Use Disorders. She also served as vice chair of the Transportation and Energy Committee. But the Democrats have cleared the decks of her responsibilities so she can run for the 7th CD, rather than doing the job she was elected to do. Likewise, her social media presence has turned away from her Colorado Senate constituents and toward courting the voters of CO-07. She doesn't care about her constituents; she simply is looking for the next rung on the political ladder she's climbing. I never designed my life to run for office--to me it is a call to duty. As your next U.S Congressman from Colorado I pledge my undivided support to solving the issues impacting you. | | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | Last week, Erik attended his precinct caucus as he hopes you did also. Peter,

Rep. Madison Cawthorn called Ukraine’s democratically elected President Volodymyr Zelenskyy a “thug.”

Cawthorn joins a growing list of Republicans jumping on the Trump train of supporting the invasion of a democratic country. While Ukrainian President Zelenskyy is standing with his people in the face of adversity, Donald Trump and his loyalists are continuing their anti-democracy tirade, praising Putin for an unjust and unprovoked war.
| [STOP THE GOP ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42901882/334806825/1614996473?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220312-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlOGViY2FjLTQzYTItZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dl5UeB2rE5Cfrurl2DlfjcNaW9WG4mRIIsOmyUh7DpY=)

Millions of Americans, including members of my family, would lose their healthcare, including people with pre-existing conditions. Last time I checked we had a blue wave in 2018 and knocked that idea down. Are we really about to have to fight this again? As you guys know, protecting healthcare is the reason Josh decided to run for office to begin with. His brother David was born premature and there's no way Josh's family could have afforded his life-saving care without their health insurance. It's incredibly personal for Josh, so yeah, he won't be backing down from this fight. His brother David was born premature and there's no way Josh's family could have afforded his life-saving care without their health insurance. It's incredibly personal for Josh, so yeah, he won't be backing down from this fight. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Josh believes that healthcare is a fundamental right that should be affordable and accessible to every single person in America. Let's show Ron Johnson we're definitely not backing down from this fight. \- Camille Torres Campaign Manager * = =

_Subject: [Action] Tell Sinema to take on corporate greed_
_Date: Wednesday, March 9th, 2022_ Peter, Across the country, corporations are ripping people off. Hidden fees. Higher prices. Crappy customer service. We don’t need to tell you. You know. But on top of all that — now we have to deal with inflation. Higher prices on everything from groceries to gasoline, from essentials to luxuries. **The reality is, current inflation levels are the quintessential example of corporate greed.** Corporations use inflation as an excuse to jack their prices up even higher, creating record profits at the expense of everyone else — and effectively lowering your wages by decreasing the power of your dollar. Kyrsten Sinema claims fighting inflation is a priority for her — but her past actions and current positions demonstrate that her loyalty is first and foremost to her corporate donors. clean_body: Help me protect her seat | THE DEMOCRATS ARE TRYING TO STEAL NICOLE MALLIOTAKIS’S SEAT Friends, We cannot let Democrats get away with this obvious power grab. They think by gerrymandering Nicole Malliotakis’s seat in Congress, they can hold onto the House Majority. When Nancy Pelosi tried to steal my seat before I even got to Congress, Nicole HAD MY BACK! Now it is my turn to have her back and help her fight off the Democrats from stealing her seat in Congress and stealing the voice away from the people she was elected to represent. We need to fight for Nicole and protect this seat. NY-11 will be one of the most competitive seats in the Nation, and we’ve got to step up to keep this seat Red. | Thank you for supporting Nicole, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: can I count on you, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
We can win in Iowa – the numbers don't lie – but we'll need massive grassroots resources to overcome GOP attacks and compete with spending by far-right megadonors.
| | |
---
This is pretty urgent, Peter – can I count on you?
I'm just hours away from my midnight fundraising deadline – but to hit my goal, I still need to raise another $8,500 before then. In a race this close, it's absolutely critical that we're hitting important benchmarks like this one.
You see, from fighting for working families to holding Senate control, there's so much on the line here in Iowa. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate, meaning defeating vulnerable GOP senators like my opponent, Chuck Grassley, is critical to maintaining our majority and continuing to deliver for Americans.
Luckily, things here on the ground are looking good for Democrats –** Iowans have had it with Sen. Grassley. He's facing record low approval ratings, and close to two-thirds of likely voters say they're ready for someone new.** There's real momentum here – I can feel it – but to be honest with you, we're up against some powerful forces, Peter.
**The GOP Senate campaign arm has raised more than $100 MILLION to take back the Senate. Fox News has already attacked me – and Trump himself _personally_ flew to Des Moines to endorse Sen. Grassley at a massive MAGA rally. **With Iowans turning against Sen. Grassley like never before, the GOP is pulling out all the stops to defeat me and defend my opponent.
**[We can win in Iowa – the numbers don't lie – but we'll need massive grassroots resources to overcome GOP attacks and compete with spending by far-right megadonors. That's why I had to reach out to you. Please, I know you care about this race: can I count on you to make a grassroots donation by our mid-month deadline to defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42902234/334808535/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk659-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQzNzkyYS00OGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdoyi_hINkF15Gd2y4OqefNllhuCCpbFHlLOELqa3ws=)**
In 2018, grassroots Democrats like you sent me to Washington against the odds, making me the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. With your help, this year I will become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate.
I'm so grateful that I can count on you in moments like this. Thank you.

– Abby

He's facing record low approval ratings, and close to two-thirds of likely voters say they're ready for someone new. There's real momentum here – I can feel it – but to be honest with you, we're up against some powerful forces, Peter. The GOP Senate campaign arm has raised more than $100 MILLION to take back the Senate. Fox News has already attacked me – and Trump himself personally flew to Des Moines to endorse Sen. Grassley at a massive MAGA rally. With Iowans turning against Sen. Grassley like never before, the GOP is pulling out all the stops to defeat me and defend my opponent. = In 2018, grassroots Democrats like you sent me to Washington against the odds, making me the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. With your help, this year I will become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. I'm so grateful that I can count on you in moments like this. Thank you. – Abby | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

---
Peter,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_

name: Team Schmidt
subject: Endorsements Roll In!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
As we get closer to November, we’re happy to share that we’ve logged yet another couple of huge weeks for Team Schmidt. Friend, As we get closer to November, we’re happy to share that we’ve logged yet another couple of huge weeks for Team Schmidt.
There is great enthusiasm all over Kansas for Derek Schmidt in the governor’s office. We would love it if you'd join our campaign. Before you close this email – please forward this to your friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team. We’re excited to keep growing Team Schmidt! [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f25177c5bff543528b44c90572061d2c&_e=2J5oJ9n6INK6zZCvXipF_1AVkGYRijF-Z6R8NcH88zfODfSJSmDu7R2HbibMUPyOaLNPHviLVoKo6F28MDidNq9ARRvdmF2kQCw5aU-sS53w-EVh2EGJHsA1WGLXvHmrqxa2BaUahNATx3pQkXtqbDxRic9yqVScmq9MxgdWtVGWi73NsBVR3KSYLBLNB7HIMARUOaUzwqi83d6wfraVpJV7qane9hestBAn9NtXGfNeK2fvwhujtZDSGuFLkgrCsAsNhRLgwNVsCF0euNCQyOz038XBWGbgTukhO8u_AEr05lmVCSUGrY5MCfKQR3MT0g0RDZQSKzhDFS0GVqRKGa8lHfPRGvBF0N6THXoDcOfwJp6-JFWK5Ez-o5UMbsxkq04xnUE2etj0tiKB5czpV7vMvU1mklJ0gjr0vNSqF67u5nmmnGIRq-m1xHgCruhFY2bk4ljlNz-gm5YKgyIgNJh61gNtFpIaTQcspfPoysDW1oh0dwOsI4gUIFZ4uu21) Check out each of our recent endorsements below: _“The Executive Committee of the Kansas Young Republicans is proud to endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt in the race to become the next Governor of the State of Kansas....The sad reality is Kansas in recent years has not been an attractive place to live, work, and grow a family....We cannot afford another four years under Laura Kelly, who spent her first term in office closing schools and mandating masks on kids in order to return to in-person learning, picking which businesses and jobs are essential or non-essential, and constantly voting bills in the Legislature that would put more money in our pockets. Simply put,**Kansas needs Derek Schmidt in the governor’s office.** We would encourage Young Republicans, and all Kansas to vote for him in November.”_ **Kansas Young Republicans** _“I'm excited to cast my vote for Derek Schmidt for the office of Governor. Derek has already fought for Kansans' rights as the Attorney General. I believe he will continue his legacy of constitutionally driven integrity and professionalism when he becomes Governor of Kansas.”_ **Wichita County Sheriff Kristopher Casper** _“I have worked with Derek for over 10 years. He will bring common sense and needed transformational leadership to the Governor’s office. All Kansans, rural and urban, will benefit from his steady hand at the wheel approach to governing. Derek is the right person at the right time to take Kansas to the next level as a good place to live, to work, and have your family safe with plenty of opportunities. Derek has Marearl’s and my full support to be the next Governor of Kansas.”_ **Former Kansas Senate Majority Leader Jim Denning** _“As the Sheriff of Bourbon County, I am proud and honored to offer my full support to Derek Schmidt as he runs for the Governor of the great State of Kansas. As Attorney General, Derek has proven that he is a trusted leader based on his commonsense approach to anything in front of him. Derek has always been a law-and-order individual who believes in defending our individual liberties and freedom, while giving his full support to the men and women in blue. Derek Schmidt will be the Governor that the State of Kansas needs to lead us through the next 4 years.”_ **Bourbon County Sheriff Bill Martin** _"We are proud to endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt's campaign for Kansas Governor. As Kansas' chief law enforcement official for more than a decade, Derek has consistently advocated for the right policies when it comes to securing America's southern border and by extension keeping Kansas communities safe. Unlike the current Kansas Governor, he has taken the time to visit the border in Texas to better understand the current crisis and how to mitigate its effects on Kansas communities.”_ **National Border Patrol Council** _“PROUD to stand up and support Derek Schmidt as the next Governor of our great state. When it comes to the kitchen table issues - healthcare, education, jobs and economic security, Derek is the leader Kansans need at the helm. I look forward to our important work ahead in getting Kansans back to work, ensuring we take care of our most vulnerable, improving the quality of education in Kansas classrooms and lowering the cost of healthcare. Derek will continue to be a strong leader for Kansas and work every day to make it the best state in the country to live, work and raise a family. He has my full support in the race for governor.”_ **Former President and CEO of National Down Syndrome Society Sara Hart Weir** Just like the endorsers above, YOU are a vital part of this team, and we are abundantly grateful for your continued support. Thank you! Team Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.
| [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f25177c5bff543528b44c90572061d2c&_e=2J5oJ9n6INK6zZCvXipF_ywjGh_VmV_FaCMlIvJUezubJ4DFGpHi5cEGqt-GBXSMFIX9pgx3f-H84s48P3rqauZlyF6cMh7XoupXYCqixC3hj1OzHlOMkq7YJdb4x8nN960NEl-ZKzL3VvGjdhshAq3iQFU-NIL2l98ZossQNS_9pjh90ENiEjxp0wKM8zBtQ2mxQzfCrQ-go2P-QACq7MMeKlXrUQ2kXY4jqh7iccYe9AAMsMHKWeGcyShftKKgQeztkT-FulLiL8oZZUMuHUH2CPu9rdqu9T47oDPVVtM%3D) | [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f25177c5bff543528b44c90572061d2c&_e=2J5oJ9n6INK6zZCvXipF_1OpjYheH85cTO0GV6ROcs0ylIS4hSvdUbkCuosHqxvLvmqPOfOr3e2d2wPhGp7CS2oRRKqbKnaijlpyfUWtSfTcIQDqygJMFFb95WwiaTbrJH5z0SSM8x5trR3I2KACzi95LuKyn6iFH8Hax0r42q3-G-ffuSKV2R3VjgX2NcuSJ-TdY_LXb6BZv7cBwpRkhb7rni8cALy0lzs4OKQhvVycQ9n65mWYurnzSuMXSH6InUdIt98iQuGPCM9v3JnTIg%3D%3D) | [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f25177c5bff543528b44c90572061d2c&_e=2J5oJ9n6INK6zZCvXipF_9gnbJcA9ZqV58NbOVbWUioEJgJ9sFVQvELCJJ25UwtNRMrO4pc6gnc9kZMst2a4xktgoqVu7VB1YFpHXxKXjGjY1dLVIo2fKr14pnq62ueWxQCmDEvsaiufJJsd_6ChJLxQPoTIS0VTDZdz5Bc9WVnobplnnUCBDJSXGAgBZz8nTck0DdUubOLiWM-ElqOCph3mm6K034MrUWJ_GYZxFdfhyle7aQqLUBQ9ykA0FqHABn_KVIBlZ11ltWLvwgEF-xI690NUbxPmTL9y4X8UQaw%3D)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham (personal)
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I'd like to tell you a little bit more about my story and my vision for New Mexico
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897580/334783259/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1173-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg3YmZhMy0yNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WSXmcws50r-1TQih4bppEvnaVxRTbCEcn917PSHkKg=)
---
Peter – I'd like to tell you a little bit more about my story and my vision for New Mexico. It's a longer email, but it's important, so I hope you'll read it until the end.
My ancestors have lived in New Mexico for twelve generations: I grew up in Santa Fe, and all of my big milestones – from my very first steps to the moment I walked across the stage to accept my college diploma – happened right here in New Mexico.
Growing up, my grandfather served as a state Supreme Court justice. It wasn't long before I chose to take a similar path, dedicating my life to public service in order to build a brighter future for our state, first as the Director of Aging, then as a U.S. Congresswoman, and now as Governor.
When I became our country's first Democratic Hispanic woman elected to serve as a Governor, I made a promise to advocate for every community in our minority-majority state. Since then, I've kept my promise by legalizing cannabis to end the failed war on drugs, I've strengthened public schools by prioritizing educators and students, I've provided free higher education to every student, and more.
My Republican challengers, on the other hand, have used every chance that they can get to divide us while offering no plans to run our state. I'm a New Mexican through and through, so I know that these extremists don't represent our values, and I'll never stop fighting to keep New Mexico blue.
**But the truth is, I can't defend our state from the GOP by myself, and I have a tough road ahead. I haven't been able to raise a single dollar since December because of a fundraising blackout. Now that the fundraising blackout is lifted, I'm counting on 10,000 supporters to become Election Year Members before midnight tomorrow.**
**[Peter, if you believe in my progressive vision for New Mexico, I need you on my side right now: Please, will you donate $5 or more to become an Election Year Member?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897581/334783260/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1173-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg3YmZhMy0yNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WSXmcws50r-1TQih4bppEvnaVxRTbCEcn917PSHkKg=)**
Thanks for being part of this team.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/25be7547-e19e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/a687bfa3-26a2-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg3YmZhMy0yNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WSXmcws50r-1TQih4bppEvnaVxRTbCEcn917PSHkKg=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
---

Individuals and political action committees may contribute up to $10,400 per election (primary and general being separate elections) for a total of $20,800 per election cycle. New Mexicans for Michelle may not accept contributions from foreign nationals, banks, or contributions made in the name of another.Contributions can be mailed to the following address: P.O. Box 25422 Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Team Samuels
subject: Energy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
We talk a lot about energy in politics. We talk about energy independence, renewable energy, fossil fuels, and so much more. Ben Samuels is running for Congress because he is sick of watching dirty energy pollute our air and our democracy. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42897753/334783979/838227398?refcode=220312-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWFhZTFlNS0yNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DztjheWoZfrUdxCs_OsDeAxsVH-GJ_2yBGHBAx1L55Y=) Team, We talk a lot about energy in politics. We talk about energy independence, renewable energy, fossil fuels, and so much more. Ben Samuels is running for Congress because he is sick of watching dirty energy pollute our air and our democracy. Currently, Washington runs on non-renewables but Washington ALSO runs on the power of lobbyists and dark money groups. And to be frank, it is gunking up the whole system. Our campaign is all about clean energy. We’re fighting for renewable energy powering our cars, and people-powered politics. **[We’re in this for clean energy, we're in this for grassroots energy. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: When I was young
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator.
#

_Note: This email is from Sen. Maggie Hassan of New Hampshire, who’s in a tough re-election fight that could determine control of the Senate this November._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?refcode=em220312-1-60&t=1&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)
Hi there,
When I was young, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator. But it has been the honor of my lifetime to represent Granite Staters.
I ran for office to make sure everyone was counted in our country’s shared success. In the Senate, **I strive to make our democracy more inclusive and more accessible each and every day – and I'm dedicated to continuing this work.**
But here's the deal: **Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and I'm at the top of his list.** That's why GOP groups are doing whatever they can to beat me – spending over $7.5 million against me (more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat), rallying out-of-state dark money groups, and recruiting extreme Republicans to run against me.
[**I hate asking for money, but I urgently need your help to win this November. So will you please split $5 or whatever you can between my campaign and Alex Padilla’s to help defend this seat and protect Democrats' vulnerable Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?refcode=em220312-1-60&t=2&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Maggie Hassan and Alex Padilla instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em220312-1-60&t=3&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220312-1-60&t=4&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220312-1-60&t=5&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220312-1-60&t=6&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220312-1-60&t=7&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-hassan?express_lane=true&refcode=em220312-1-60&t=8&refcode2=683_159979_EMs94n&akid=683%2E159979%2EEMs94n)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Team Booker
subject: We'll get straight to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we’ll get
straight to the point:

* March marks the first end-of-quarter month of the election year. The
deadline for fundraising is on March 31, at 11:59 pm ET before we have
to submit our quarter’s fundraising numbers to the FEC.
* This deadline is critical to our success because it’s a determination
of how financially strong our campaign is, and how much traction our
movement is gaining.
* The best way to make sure we’re set up for success in the next few
weeks? To have as many people from our movement as possible chipping
in — $5 or any other amount. Because the power of our
campaign comes from the people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220312?refcode=em20220312-1626&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1626_346206__SBcHC&akid=1626%2E346206%2E_SBcHC ]We noticed that you haven’t yet chipped in this month* to our campaign,
so we wanted to ask: Will you help set us up for success and chip in
$5 to our campaign today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220312?refcode=em20220312-1626&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1626_346206__SBcHC&akid=1626%2E346206%2E_SBcHC ]Contribute $5

Your donation of $5 isn’t just to help us reach a goal. It
also helps us:

* Train organizers so we can effectively (and directly) reach out to
voters in all 120 counties of our Commonwealth
* Hire key campaign staff to expand our capacity
* Acquire digital tools so we can get our message out to millions of
Kentuckians
* Provide PPE for our campaign office
* Reimburse our staff for gas as they travel across Kentucky
* Grow our historic movement to unite Kentuckians, from the hood to the
holler

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220312?refcode=em20220312-1626&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1626_346206__SBcHC&akid=1626%2E346206%2E_SBcHC ]Every dollar makes a difference when it comes to achieving these goals
— and more — above. Please chip in $5 or any amount you can
afford to our campaign today.

Together,

Team Booker

^* If you've donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email
address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you
for your support!

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220312-1626-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1626_346206__SBcHC&akid=1626%2E346206%2E_SBcHC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1626%2E346206%2E_SBcHC

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friends,

**[Our mid-month fundraising deadline is just 3 days away. Here’s why it’s so important:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42899653/334792641/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.12_b1_ififif_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.12_b1_ififif_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjAxYzc2YS0zMGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-eCz-T1x-ZCYDmEJjuzVsix-LwsrSQt-ix-UYlhx3YI=)**

**IF** we don’t raise $5,000 by Tuesday, we’ll fall short of our mid-month fundraising goal.

**IF** we fall short, we will finish this quarter with drained resources. Remember, our opponent outraised us last quarter.

**AND IF** we don’t have those resources, we won’t be able to launch ads, send emails like this one, and have face-to-face conversations with voters.
