name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We launched a lawsuit against Twitter
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814894:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59814895:6cq7cgEkN:m:1:3253819041:EB79ADE5E3B518700AFD42E2B817C233:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

body:
Another Big Endorsement | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6887181?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=7d329bdd7d&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| The oath of military service members is undertaken with the solemn understanding that there is**no expiration date** on the words uttered, and they seal an _eternal bond between one patriot and their country._ **I am deeply honored to share that Veterans For America First (VFAF) has recently endorsed my race to serve as the next governor of New Mexico! It means the world to me to be endorsed by my fellow patriots and veterans!**

Recently I was invited to join members of VFAF for a trip to the southern border in Texas. Because of this invitation, _I was able to see the atrocities, the human smuggling, and the unaccompanied minors that are coming across the border with my own eyes._

I shared some remarks about the experience [in this video](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=f7e939efd0&e=102b599530):
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=f49f94a62e&e=102b599530)
---
| **I want to thank everyone in the VFAF organization for doing their part to take our country back for freedom!**
I am moved to be working alongside the patriotic spirit of so many engaged Americans responding in our country’s great hour of great need. Together we will preserve the rights and freedoms of all Americans by standing up for the Rule of Law, especially at our southern border. As your next governor, I will assert common sense border policies to safeguard the well-being of New Mexican communities. Please consider supporting my efforts to serve as your next governor by making an endorsement of your own today...

body:
[1]Erica Smith

If you opened up our ActBlue right now, this would be one of the first
things you see:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44427?refcode=em20220312-984&t=1024&akid=984%2E3698%2EczDX5s ]ActBlue: $25.79 Avg. Contribution

The average contribution to support Erica is just $25.79. We’re so proud
of this number. It shows that our campaign is resonating with everyday
people — the very folks Erica will fight for in Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44427?refcode=em20220312-984&t=1025&akid=984%2E3698%2EczDX5s ]Can you join our people-powered movement to send Erica Smith to
Congress by making a contribution of $25.79? Every donation will help us
file the strongest Q1 FEC report possible and fuel this campaign to
victory.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44427?refcode=em20220312-984&t=1044&akid=984%2E3698%2EczDX5s ]Donate $25.79

Since Erica doesn’t take a single penny from corporate PACs or the fossil
fuel industry, our campaign is powered by $5, $10, and $25.79
contributions from small-dollar donors in North Carolina and beyond.

$25.79 means clipboards and pens for our volunteers to take when they
canvass their neighborhoods. It means funds to travel across all 19
counties that make up our district to speak with North Carolinians who
feel left out and left behind. And it means resources to pay for campaign
literature, ads, and more.

But to be transparent: We’ll be up against Republican super PACs and
mega-donors who will say, do, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us —
because this seat is a critical seat in the fight to control the U.S.
House.

To send Erica to Congress, we’re counting on your support. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44427?refcode=em20220312-984&t=1045&akid=984%2E3698%2EczDX5s ]If our
campaign for livable wages, accessible and affordable healthcare, union
rights, universal broadband, reproductive rights, and more resonates with
you. Please donate $25.79 or whatever you can today.

Team Erica Smith

Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator,
who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural
Eastern North Carolina.

Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — her home district – in Congress,
where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal
healthcare, voting rights, and more.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44391?refcode=em20220312-984-box&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1046&akid=984%2E3698%2EczDX5s ]Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House
seat and give power back to working people »

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220312-984-footer&t=1048&refcode2=984_3698_czDX5s&akid=984%2E3698%2EczDX5s

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

body:
The past week has been exciting! We've been out in the community collecting signatures to officially get on the ballot for the June primary – and I’ve loved getting the chance to talk to voters across our district.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900242/334795935/-566240111?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220312-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVhMjRiNC0zNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8bOjsQwABRlgg4cKB4mrVF-yEMEpTnmh7KnK_gZ8M=)
---
| Peter,

The past week has been exciting! We've been out in the community collecting signatures to officially get on the ballot for the June primary – and I’ve loved getting the chance to talk to voters across our district.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900243/334795937/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220312-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVhMjRiNC0zNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8bOjsQwABRlgg4cKB4mrVF-yEMEpTnmh7KnK_gZ8M=)
Collecting signatures is an important part of running for office, but it means we have had less time for fundraising, so we are falling _just_ behind on our March fundraising goals.

[_**That’s why in my limited time today, I knew I had to write my top supporters to help get us back on track. Will you help close the gap by pitching in $5 or more?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900244/334795939/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220312-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVhMjRiNC0zNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8bOjsQwABRlgg4cKB4mrVF-yEMEpTnmh7KnK_gZ8M=)

Peter, we can’t afford to fall behind our goals. Every dollar we raise goes directly to our voter outreach efforts. And every dollar we raise translates into more voters we can reach before they head to the polls in June.

The winner of this primary will face off in one of the most important races in the entire country. This seat alone could determine control of the House of Representatives. I have the vision and the experience to win in November and deliver on a bold, ambitious agenda for Upstate New York.

[_**So I need your help to stay on track toward our fundraising goals while we do the hard work of collecting petition signatures. If you want to flip this seat from red to blue too, please, pitch in a few bucks now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42900251/334795943/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220312-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVhMjRiNC0zNmEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ8bOjsQwABRlgg4cKB4mrVF-yEMEpTnmh7KnK_gZ8M=)

Every dollar we raise goes directly to our voter outreach efforts. And every dollar we raise translates into more voters we can reach before they head to the polls in June. The winner of this primary will face off in one of the most important races in the entire country. This seat alone could determine control of the House of Representatives. Hello,
In Ukraine, we are seeing a war that can only be summed up as democracy being attacked by authoritarianism. And everyday citizens are taking up arms, making molotov cocktails, and defending their democracy, door-to-door, tooth-and-nail.
Here at home, there’s been a much colder type of war between democracy and authoritarianism. We are lucky that January 6th ended with as little bloodshed as it did.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley because, for 36 years in the U.S. Navy, I fought for our democracy abroad, and I’ll fight for it every day here in the United States Senate.**
Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are already raising money into Super PACs and campaigning against me here in Iowa. There’s one reason: The early polls show a close race, and Senate control is on the line. They know I’m the one who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.
In order to fight back and win, we need to raise $250,000 before our critical mid-month deadline. **We’re still falling short right now, but if grassroots donors like you give now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42904269/334818665/-42398318?refcode=em20220312pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZkY2I5OS02MGEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76IHd-ZnWu1M5czoitXx6xK1YxLn0Csx1j0Ft60AgC8=)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Gas Tax Vote on Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Six Dollars and Counting](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorUMFr7mNwFsOAnUr4DN5vJo4XHxuubvBiX-TZJ4bcxIw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar12_final&n=1) On Monday, Republicans will be united on the Assembly Floor in voting for my bill, AB 1638, to suspend the gas tax entirely. I hope our Democrat colleagues will join us. Before the vote, I’m holding a press conference at a Sacramento gas station with James Gallagher and Senate Republican Leader Scott Wilk. You can watch live on my Facebook page at 11:45 AM. We’ve already forced Newsom to change his position. He now agrees Californians need relief, but he’s only offering “rebates.” A check in the mail at some future time: we saw how well that worked with the EDD. Meanwhile, Newsom’s school mask mandate has formally expired. But the LA teachers union insists it’s “premature.” Any board member still voting to require masks needs to be challenged and defeated. Gratuitous cruelty to children is disqualifying. Vaccine passports are also ending, with no evidence they did anything but create a black market for forged documents. My bill opposing passports never got a hearing. That’s California for you: paying the highest gas taxes while driving over the deepest potholes; facing the highest government coercion while receiving the lowest government performance. Increasingly, that’s America for you as well. We're fighting to set our state and country on a new course. And this week saw the biggest development of the campaign. I’m honored to now be the officially endorsed candidate of the California Republican Party. [Support my campaign for Congress](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar12_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAx0KnLiheXLy-2Y04714FNdRSmfAMOhi15Mf5qK-IQ9bw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar12_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator

body:

#
Guess what?
If you donate in response to this email, then you might just get a phone call from Beto, thanking you for chipping in and powering our grassroots campaign.
[ Make your first contribution of $3 to help Beto defeat Greg Abbott in November. [Help us take on Greg Abbott and build the biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen by chipping in right now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53889?refcode=ema20220312-180106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=47&akid=180106%2E444211%2EKDSkpo) Then keep your phone close because Beto might call to personally thank you.

Beto for Texas

We have over 55,000 folks volunteering — writing letters, calling voters, and talking to Texans at their door. Beto has already been to every part of Texas and he has met thousands of voters. But, if we're going to reach our goals and win this election, we can't suffer a blowout on the money side — Greg Abbott has $50 million dollars in the bank right now. Then keep your phone close because Beto might call to personally thank you. Thanks for everything you do, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

clean_body: We could have lost OVER $115,000,000 Team – It’s been one year since the American Rescue Plan (ARP) was signed into law – a plan that MAGA Loyalist Mike Garcia voted against. = | ****=** The ARP helped families across the nation recover from the devastating economic and health effects of the pandemic. Garcia would rather play political games than help his constituents here in California’s 27th district. If it went his way, we would have lost out on over $115 million dollars for expenses like public safety, public health, health care, human services, and similar employees, including first responders. It’s time for this district to be represented by someone like Quaye Quartey , who served this country for two decades as an intelligence officer in the Navy, and is ready to serve once again by advocating for the hard-working families of this district in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = – Flip CA-27 Blue | Retired Naval Commander John Quaye Quartey II felt a call to serve his country once again after he watched extremists carry out a Trump-fueled insurrection at our nation’s Capitol. Fellow American,

Our Democrat opponent has spent over $3 million airing TV ads across Georgia in the last 30 days.

That's a LOT OF MONEY. Folks in Georgia are seeing my opponent on their TVs every single day claiming to be a "champion for the people."

**But the $3 million ad blitz is just a drop in the bucket of his campaign account, which is flush with more than $23 million.**

**Here's the good news, Fellow American._The race remains neck and neck._**

We are planning our own Team Herschel advertising campaign. Will you help us spread our message about holding politicians accountable, reversing the soaring cost of gas and food, reviving our economy, and fighting crime in our neighborhoods?

**Since we didn't launch our campaign until late August, our opponent got an 8-month head start on his fundraising efforts. That's why we cannot afford to miss even a single financial goal during this campaign.**

As our opponent wrote in one of his recent emails, _**"our entire Democratic agenda - from health care to good-paying jobs to voting rights - is on the line in this race, so we can't afford a single misstep."**_

Our opponent is correct that the entire Democrat agenda is on the line in our race. When we win in Georgia, we will flip control of the Senate back to Republican hands so President Biden's partisan agenda will be stopped in its tracks.

| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpbLgVc~)

I'm appalled.

Trump's Republicans just had their biggest meeting of the entire year and plotted their takeover of our Democratic Majority.

If they win this election, they admitted they want to:

\-- **RAISE** taxes on working Americans
\-- **SUPPRESS** our Democratic votes
\-- **ATTACK** women and LGBTQ Americans

**[Hear me loud and clear: I will not allow Republicans to defeat our Democratic Majority and ruin the lives of millions. But I desperately need your help to stop them. If we're going to keep up this fight, I need your support all the way until Election Day. So I'm calling for a HISTORIC response -- 500 monthly recurring gifts before midnight -- to OUTRAISE these vile Republicans and ensure they NEVER hold power again. Can I count on you to become a Majority Maker and rush in a monthly recurring $5 gift? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs02~)**

With so much at stake, our Majority Makers -_Democrats who give recurring monthly contributions of $15, $10, or even $5 _- are more important than ever.

And as the backbone of our grassroots team, Majority Makers will also receive exclusive updates about the state of our races and opportunities to hear directly from me and other Democratic leaders.

**[So can I count on you to step up and become a Majority Maker today?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqpRg-)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
MAJORITY MAKER STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $5](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Trump hinted he'll run for president if Republicans win back the House.

And now, Republicans just inched ahead in the latest poll.

_**I know we can protect our House.

I know we can stop Trump from ever holding power again.

I know we can thwart Republicans' vicious plans to raise our taxes, erase our vote, and spread their bigotry.**_

**[But it's going to take every single one of us stepping up - 500 Democrats before midnight - to close this fundraising gap, retake the lead in the polls, and ensure we have what we need to WIN this election. So, can I count on you to become a Majority Maker and rush in a monthly recurring $5 to ensure these Republican plans never become reality? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Erik Aadland to participate in 7th Congressional District Assembly
body:
Grassroots campaign sets eyes on the Primary Election ballot
---
| | | | | | Volume 33 | March 9, 2022
---
|
---
| Erik to participate in 7th Congressional District Assembly
---
| | |
---|---
|
Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom:

(March 11, 2022) U.S. Congressional candidate Erik Aadland today announced he will participate in the 7th Congressional District Assembly on Friday, April 8, in Colorado Springs.

A decorated combat veteran, Erik has been traveling the district meeting with Republicans and talking with them about the issues with which they most struggle--the crushing cost of gasoline, the high cost of groceries, a world on the brink of war, and a porous border that is contributing to skyrocketing crime.
"I have always been a grassroots candidate," said Erik. "This is my opportunity to seal my approval with the delegates and show that I am the candidate best equipped to win this congressional seat."

At 4:56 p.m. on Friday, March 11, Aadland for Colorado was notified by the Colorado Secretary of State's office that its petition drive fell just short of qualifying him for the ballot. Currently it stands in the curative stage.

"As a war veteran, I know what it is like to fight and win," said Erik. "After two tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I learned to be prepared to adjust to the circumstances in front of me. I look forward to meeting with the delegates at the assembly and not only winning their vote, but their hearts as well."

There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
It's no secret: the South Bay doesn't have enough affordable housing, and it's our working families who suffer the consequences. I've been fighting to find solutions to this shortage since I graduated college. That's why, throughout my career, I have:
🏢 worked to bring 500 units for seniors and low-income families to my childhood home, Barrio Logan.
👩👩👧👦 introduced an ordinance to end housing discrimination
🏡 halted housing evictions during the COVID-19 outbreak.
One of my top priorities in Sacramento will be making sure we expand affordable housing for everyone.
Voting has started for my race. Will you help me build a better California by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_031222_AffordableHousing]

Thank you!

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hey folks – sorry to reach out like this, I’ll be quick. The other day our polling team reached out to you and asked whether or not you support a $1,400 stimulus payment for Social Security seniors. Well I was just reviewing the results and didn’t see your response... did you forget to hit submit?? I need to finalize the results by tomorrow morning, so I’m giving you ONE last shot to submit your opinion for Congress: | Eddie Team Ruiz Digital Team \------Forwarded message------ | | | | Folks – many American seniors can’t afford their bills right now. Housing and health care costs are higher than they’ve EVER been. A fourth stimulus check would provide desperately needed relief to America’s seniors. | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Vermont’s GOP governor won reelection by 41 points
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
The best chance we’ve got at protecting our democracy is voting more Democrats into the Senate, and Peter keeping this seat blue is essential.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
Hello,
**Vermont’s Republican governor won reelection in the 2020 election by 41 points.** That was the largest margin of victory in a Vermont governor’s race in nearly 25 years, even as President Biden and other Democrats won big on election night.
**Now, national Republicans have targeted our open Senate seat as a “sleeper” race for November’s midterms.** Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and the rest of GOP leadership are desperate to return to power, and now they’ve identified Vermont as one potential path to regaining the Senate majority.
If we don’t protect and expand our Senate majority, we can’t act on voting rights, reproductive justice, climate change, prescription drug prices, and so many other issues that touch people’s lives. But with the GOP’s big victory in Vermont just over a year ago, a Republican could win another major Vermont election.
[**We’re at an important point of this campaign, especially with the Republicans coming after Vermont’s open Senate seat. Will you continue supporting Peter’s run for the Senate with a $15 contribution today?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=3&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=14&amount=3&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=16&amount=15&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=18&amount=28&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=20&amount=50&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=10&amount=100&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=12&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---

---
If Senate Republicans win back the majority, we can’t pass the progressive agenda our country needs for its future, from Medicare for All to a Green New Deal.
The best chance we’ve got at protecting our democracy is voting more Democrats into the Senate—and Peter keeping this seat blue is essential.
Rick Scott and Mitch McConnell have explicitly targeted Peter and this Senate race because they think it’s a vulnerable target, but that’s only because they haven’t experienced the full strength of this grassroots coalition. We need to make it clear to our opponents that we’re not just here to fight—**we’re here to win**.
[**Donate $15 or anything you can today and play a major role in electing Peter Welch as the next Vermont senator.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1519?t=7&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
Thank you!
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22mar?refcode=em_20220312_f_t_gop&refcode2=131_61531_2Z8-tu&akid=131%2E61531%2E2Z8-tu)
---

body:
They can’t erase us| | | Hi there, [**I am proud to be the first gay person to ever run for Congress in WA’s 6th District. In Congress, I will fight for federal protections for our LGBTQ+ community — not let the GOP drag us backward. Can you chip in $3 now to help me win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42904854/334844571/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmFmMjdjMC02ZWEyLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3T_3KvKCRQCrxAeJegRDWUmTpKfkjbs8IUtBptZFyL0=) Florida lawmakers passed the notorious “Don’t Say Gay” bill, which outlaws any mention of sexual orientation in schools. Kids with same-sex parents? Can’t mention them. Closeted gay kid? Forced to stay in the closet. Now the bill goes to Ron DeSantis to sign. There are 15 similar proposals in nine states. I refuse to go backwards on our rights. In Congress, I will fight for passage of the Equality Act, banning discrimination against same-sex couples who want to foster and adopt kids, banning conversion therapy, and more. [**I say gay. name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Biden must boost domestic energy to lower gas prices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
The Biden administration must act immediately to boost domestic energy production and provide relief to Kansas families struggling with skyrocketing g Friend, The Biden administration must act immediately to boost domestic energy production and provide relief to Kansas families struggling with skyrocketing gasoline prices. The average price for a gallon of gas in Kansas has reached $3.824. That is nearly 30 cents more than last week alone! It’s $1.16 more than we were paying at the pump last year. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=ae5ab4725daf467489c348df36625870&_e=ZfkYz-lD3oIs3h3PbgTYvKIdZRkv68Mw00O3SWFYvzJ7RlOLmefHy4chPrRjYKAhF3OZxt8ti9k-O06-HszEsP0CBrnjdKrYcvZcyzs_wlmgm7pezTZQQeoJfXOPLXh3KlYSsRNgL8J80jpiFXtdg3IP7unEjSF_e7XGbmRxNzoSt9msTDIkCiaIcvT4vXgm2PxZE8IZpjrVlGVNG66RKPINjOOHZ6edtPS2V8JpzVDfAv0aopwne3uQjjw1QgmI8TZGzJfWEgtiPuvWqR_7JmxgyCUAGGuqsqiVBXS1tX5YnXmxndZgIDSx0b178b46lJjQ1mWAw-dMypR-IuhJksFq-IEeEzkG42nVDeIxh1OTS-coJebmH2y7JKIaN1vsa-0awsRwc8uG8SPH8HhYPlU2lGkI7iI0qypkiE8f3Xq4Iu5v9qHKkbRQAYqB3U-lQiB5X63IQg4qYLrg7JrYQl3-CiRYQ0CzefSyyify9QCBMarH3Fv9oBM9hHnAYBYF) Make no mistake - President Biden's policies in canceling the Keystone XL pipeline, strangling exploration on public lands, and piling restrictive and costly regulations on energy producers are responsible for America's renewed dependence on Russian and other foreign oil - and now Kansans are feeling the pain at the pump and throughout our economy because of that unnecessary vulnerability. As attorney general, I have fought back against many of these unwise Biden policies. As governor, I would have joined with 25 governors who recently called on President Biden to act now to boost domestic production. Governor Kelly has remained silent as gas prices have soared. Will you sign your name now to tell Joe Biden and Laura Kelly it’s time to unleash American energy? [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=ae5ab4725daf467489c348df36625870&_e=ZfkYz-lD3oIs3h3PbgTYvKIdZRkv68Mw00O3SWFYvzJ7RlOLmefHy4chPrRjYKAhF3OZxt8ti9k-O06-HszEsP0CBrnjdKrYcvZcyzs_wlmgm7pezTZQQeoJfXOPLXh3KlYSsRNgL8J80jpiFXtdg3IP7unEjSF_e7XGbmRxNzoSt9msTDIkCiaIcvT4vXgm2PxZE8IZpjrVlGVNG66RKPINjOOHZ6edtPS2V8JpzVDfAv0aopwne3uQjjw1QgmI8TZGzJfWEgtiPuvWqR_7JmxgyCUAGGuqsqiVBXS1tX4rc-Z_hjeykr194EkXvykLXwxsq_SUS_QnFKEAwXA3Hv1OtMJ4cKlgyCGK3o1oV4QfQvgWLm7fLA4q00WZpcFqaxoGDEtjVnBWXQyC-yY75NoaOiVaitJaSy7hVSKh8Z7Kx_UPQl0qL3aqao0fZzHRtSlFm3XpmLYrQ1PHp4KVLCjCT78yuutED6iRuMS97PEztLCACas0bJ7WIsSnkMqu) [**UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=ae5ab4725daf467489c348df36625870&_e=ZfkYz-lD3oIs3h3PbgTYvKIdZRkv68Mw00O3SWFYvzJ7RlOLmefHy4chPrRjYKAhF3OZxt8ti9k-O06-HszEsP0CBrnjdKrYcvZcyzs_wlmgm7pezTZQQeoJfXOPLXh3KlYSsRNgL8J80jpiFXtdg3IP7unEjSF_e7XGbmRxNzoSt9msTDIkCiaIcvT4vXgm2PxZE8IZpjrVlGVNG66RKPINjOOHZ6edtPS2V8JpzVDfAv0aopwne3uQjjw1QgmI8TZGzJfWEgtiPuvWqR_7JmxgyCUAGGuqsqiVBXS1tX54vWUX0qz4oOjBKRm_tM-VQZqOW_4O-YhgmR3FvHcFipp-uOsjMC63yi_jZv41kSd3GrAkaMejVZ9Tuit5EzJ77hxfZTZ6KbBps2eCWZdnLBdvprPAhN7UQv6Jq2szk72Q3oqHF9PRP-eyWVa2PrYbT2mgDD5rwuFlVLS-ep0DPABq4QAf80NGXkqK6hUw1dahh16RINrBfKfS8UkN2qDM) Last year I sued Biden over his decision to unilaterally cancel the Keystone XL pipeline which devastated our nation’s energy industry and destroyed thousands of good-paying American jobs. I've also sued Biden over his illegal “Clean Power Plan” energy regulations that will crush working families by further driving up the cost of energy. clean_body: The Biden administration must act immediately to boost domestic energy production and provide relief to Kansas families struggling with skyrocketing g Friend, The Biden administration must act immediately to boost domestic energy production and provide relief to Kansas families struggling with skyrocketing gasoline prices. The average price for a gallon of gas in Kansas has reached $3.824. That is nearly 30 cents more than last week alone! It’s $1.16 more than we were paying at the pump last year. Make no mistake - President Biden's policies in canceling the Keystone XL pipeline, strangling exploration on public lands, and piling restrictive and costly regulations on energy producers are responsible for America's renewed dependence on Russian and other foreign oil - and now Kansans are feeling the pain at the pump and throughout our economy because of that unnecessary vulnerability. As attorney general, I have fought back against many of these unwise Biden policies. As governor, I would have joined with 25 governors who recently called on President Biden to act now to boost domestic production. Governor Kelly has remained silent as gas prices have soared. Will you sign your name now to tell Joe Biden and Laura Kelly it’s time to unleash American energy? Last year I sued Biden over his decision to unilaterally cancel the Keystone XL pipeline which devastated our nation’s energy industry and destroyed thousands of good-paying American jobs. I've also sued Biden over his illegal “Clean Power Plan” energy regulations that will crush working families by further driving up the cost of energy. I’m not going to stop fighting for Kansas families. As governor, I’ll do everything in my power to make your life more affordable. As always, thank you for your support. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

| Team,

My name is Greg Stanton. I’m a Congressman from Arizona, and I’m reaching out because I’m currently running in one of the tightest races in the country. For the last four years, I’ve proudly represented Arizona’s 9th Congressional district, but because of redistricting, my new district now only leans Democratic by **one percent.**

That’s a BIG problem when Democrats historically turn out in smaller numbers during the midterms. **That’s why I’m relying on the grassroots support of folks like you to help PROTECT our House majority and KEEP this seat blue.**

**[Team, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party to help us defend this seat in November?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6FRW5bwg9SvS6xTX_t5s9JoW_qMpTMj1Zok1NN1Ii51IEZwrmm1QjlbDRcyLOJcQOSwOCUytO_RQK6YkiVzYBV7yHGskxjrXkx6FFGFPIegvG0H-2yJsBWRFQqduvz_TEYbcfYItGZJo-xEMneEfl49vzMhq3J1n3Qoh8wEZOfDxzh3-fFATs1Z3EXIeBGF0R0qluDN8hl4Rj9fHcJ4YJVUchAYWiaP9a_oXMHwLpA8dG_upbLnr2JrhAUHskCxCC56uiCn_zt7pOkerKhODq6eTJhCE_u6hthpyzSm2N8e8Yfwv33SytSWsl_MT87XfqlKmqaAneIz5V8SHfH6NEiljxqUu4j8wKwJbEiA3d_oWOITmR64hy5mRCgf_N-hfkROZ6RRDSxsN99xiiKyTOO-BWKWs2KNC1Ec0sxFRWX4ofsCRazZ9VdG5jSL9xGYs/3ka/LoZbqIxpRe-SMB-kHaA-hQ/h1/HLvMKoW2BzNuI7_kmxaMpIVW7_BJFotgMTePiHEx2Go)** [
DONATE ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6FRW5bwg9SvS6xTX_t5s9JoW_qMpTMj1Zok1NN1Ii51IEZwrmm1QjlbDRcyLOJcQOSwOCUytO_RQK6YkiVzYBV7yHGskxjrXkx6FFGFPIel3ducXfQbGLSOrmEpxURbMFCcEU3-_O0-RFlt1nvu8n0zDSWmCNID8Ib6Jmrj4Dno16GaGeXt7o7jRlW2KH_NIRrpS8NiA2Mcqz6-mJuAB3YmyjOJOPar89ZcsCNYVdk9GYuuA4irob0ysoHKrBxMH-30jkBeH9qmoK1K657s9ibjoFpUvZznEYmovj7txLIknBnjMrWTGEIMCumJw1OL-RmjJNhPYowoss0VmVKBohxePitPiZY6DLD7qD423-WLbZVDEcpu-ZjgQhjzZQz-cdTxQKbR7boUSFZKunsnQvMTYe7FX2tJyIY1NsMl2h1rH-Fz6MSljjhzi-UdJZjkU/3ka/LoZbqIxpRe-SMB-kHaA-hQ/h2/J2z88kVn0r-qNg2-UfKV_Lo8phsmHmxi0Wi8AKolGUg)
I’m not in politics for the fame or power — I’m working to make life better for everyone. As Mayor of Phoenix, I led bipartisan efforts to expand public transportation, defend LGBT equality, and support small businesses — while overseeing the highest wage growth in the country at the time.

In Congress, I’ve secured billions of dollars to invest in Arizona’s infrastructure, helped expand and support our tourism industry and local economy, and passed COVID-19 relief in the darkest days of the pandemic. **I’ve worked across the aisle when it made sense — and stood up for Arizonans always.**

With my new district lines, I’m in the toughest race I’ve _ever_ been in. I’m not the only one ringing the alarm: **Democrats just added me to their list of frontline candidates,** which means holding my seat could make or break our House majority.

**[With the RNC gunning for the seat, every dollar makes a BIG difference in a race as competitive as this one. That’s why I have to ask, can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the AZ Dems to help defend this seat?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6FRW5bwg9SvS6xTX_t5s9JoW_qMpTMj1Zok1NN1Ii51IEZwrmm1QjlbDRcyLOJcQOSwOCUytO_RQK6YkiVzYBV7yHGskxjrXkx6FFGFPIevZnba_stP5ClIHzyjeJFh2vp8Uki3_a4hBtQTf8O0CcjdNacsEkqE3A2Luysn084NU3oTF2EHxozKtvPuwnQm7RVfzqOTWoXFgf-q9_BNZzGwhHtsXYTVfE_eZzeAPO1X46utr3a4aJHe3vNb4KGGr5GX_GvkGTZ-8beaKqCssON4j2XRXhffYlnINSyt0UFpAfAHJBUgTUWLqSnikEPr5Oyp3rGZmawMRL9lZ_HodfrCDeVc9STBl2pGvODwArDZLtxznoxaxdKntAWtGFPdkp1pSLEUAqp-2Cj7cSu4hHtjkOW4YB129iF9Z7C5a7xufIX6hXV4t3YwtgSajSBt8/3ka/LoZbqIxpRe-SMB-kHaA-hQ/h3/E37ZqRixD1zXjGS9i_y910yNHjhFGBqWFZXnMJDpboA)**

clean_body: | | | Help me defend our majority | | | Team, My name is Greg Stanton. I’m a Congressman from Arizona, and I’m reaching out because I’m currently running in one of the tightest races in the country. For the last four years, I’ve proudly represented Arizona’s 9th Congressional district, but because of redistricting, my new district now only leans Democratic by one percent. That’s a BIG problem when Democrats historically turn out in smaller numbers during the midterms. That’s why I’m relying on the grassroots support of folks like you to help PROTECT our House majority and KEEP this seat blue. I’m not in politics for the fame or power — I’m working to make life better for everyone. As Mayor of Phoenix, I led bipartisan efforts to expand public transportation, defend LGBT equality, and support small businesses — while overseeing the highest wage growth in the country at the time. In Congress, I’ve secured billions of dollars to invest in Arizona’s infrastructure, helped expand and support our tourism industry and local economy, and passed COVID-19 relief in the darkest days of the pandemic. I’ve worked across the aisle when it made sense — and stood up for Arizonans always. With my new district lines, I’m in the toughest race I’ve ever been in. I’m not the only one ringing the alarm: Democrats just added me to their list of frontline candidates, which means holding my seat could make or break our House majority. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for your time, — Greg For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Reeves Session Update
subject: Session Update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
body:
Budget, Signed Bills, and Winsome Sears Birthday!
| | |
---
| | [](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f8027aa84-dd01194b-8733-4251-bd36-2d1f073388da-000000/MeYdDVF2A60-GvjisURcKZEyeWY=261)
---
| |
---
| **This Week in Session ** As the 2022 General Assembly Session comes to a close, negotiations heat up. Conference Committees are assigned to negotiate the differences between bills passed between the House and Senate, and both Senate and House versions of the budget have to be debated and reconciled. With session having ended today, the 12th, the annual rush to complete legislation and have as positive of an impact on our constituents as possible has been weighing on all Senators and Delegates, including myself. Unlike the budget, which has 14 conferees, bills that go into Conference Committee are staffed by six members: three from the House of Delegates, and three from the Senate. Once the conferees agree on a version of the bill, it is sent back to both the House and Senate floors to pass or fail once again, and finally be sent to the Governor’s desk assuming it passes.
---
| | | [](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fwatch%2F%3Fv=1330750434374803/1/0100017f8027aa84-dd01194b-8733-4251-bd36-2d1f073388da-000000/xGQ0ozvWD9nhvJPy_CHz6uwzMiE=261)
---
| Despite the amount of legislation left, one subject usually dominates conversations around this time of year: the Commonwealth’s budget. Reporters, constituents, and the legislative staffers alike often have one question: ‘Have the House and Senate reached an agreement yet?’ This year was no exception, and unfortunately we were unable to agree on the budget. The Senate Democrats have refused to negotiate with our very reasonable plans. We would like to increase the standard tax deduction for Virginian families, and eliminate the grocery tax as well as the gas tax increase. Because the Democrats have drawn their line in the sand and refuse to come to the negotiation table, Governor Youngkin will have to call a special legislative session for us to complete the budget. I am personally dedicated to reducing taxes for Virginians, from the grocery store to the gas pump to Veterans retirement pay. On top of all of this, forcing the Governor’s hand to call a special session will have an impact on his ability to make recess appointments to State Boards, something desperately needed after the Democrats blocked a multitude of the Governor’s appointments from the parole board to the Secretary of History and Natural Resources in an openly admitted partisan move. Now on to the good news. Not only did we celebrate our lovely Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears’ birthday this week, but also my office anticipates a total of 11 bills reaching the Governor’s desk by the close of session, an astounding success in my book. [Just this past Friday morning I attended a bill signing with Governor Youngkin for my very own bill, SB 529, which secures access to childcare for veterans and their families.](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBryceReevesVA%2Fvideos%2F342075774357415/1/0100017f8027aa84-dd01194b-8733-4251-bd36-2d1f073388da-000000/DdmyqElIoSeOBVYM9MZtIR0c8qw=261) I couldn’t be prouder to be a part of Governor Youngkin’s promises made, promises kept. In continuing that theme my bill SB 327, which would abolish arrest and summons quotas for our dedicated law enforcement officers, has been signed by the Speaker of the House, Speaker Gilbert, as well as President of the Senate, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and now simply awaits Governor Youngkin’s signature. This is a massive victory for both law enforcement and citizens of our commonwealth, as it allows our men and women in blue to focus on their true goal: protecting and serving Virginians. SB 528, which would cut taxes for retired veterans to the tune of 300 million dollars and which has received full bipartisan support, is still being held up in Conference Committee. A special resolution was passed, and we'll be able to keep working on it when Special Session begins.
---
| | |
---
| It is always a sad day for me when legislative session comes to a close. I enjoy working with my colleagues (even those across the aisle) to better our Commonwealth for the good of my constituents and all Virginians. Sometimes we may butt heads on certain issues, but at the close of session we have once again passed a litany of bills that will support our Commonwealth’s economy, our veterans, our law enforcement officers, and others. I will be in my district office in Fredericksburg, continuing to provide support to my constituents in dealing with state agencies and hearing their concerns, but will return to Richmond both for a called Special Session to work on the Budget and on April 27th for a one day session where the House and Senate will consider Governor Youngkin’s proposed amendments to any bills that might have crossed his desk. You can reach my district office at **(540)-645-8440** , or can email my office at [_district17@senate.virginia.gov_](mailto:district17@senate.virginia.gov). Yours in Service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
---
|
---

name: Rescue America Plan
subject: CLOSE Congress’s revolving door!
body:
Peter,
Congress has had a “revolving door” from Congressman to Lobbyist for too long.

Politicians shouldn’t be able to cash-in on their public service for a fat check from special interests.

**Rick Scott put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and stopping politicians from becoming lobbyists is a critical part of the plan.**

It’s time for a complete overhaul of government, Peter.

Republicans should be working to SLASH the federal workforce, stop corrupt Washington dollars, and hold politicians _accountable_ for their greed and self-interest.

Fellow American,

Our Democrat opponent has spent over $3 million airing TV ads across Georgia in the last 30 days.

That's a LOT OF MONEY. Folks in Georgia are seeing my opponent on their TVs every single day claiming to be a "champion for the people."

**But the $3 million ad blitz is just a drop in the bucket of his campaign account, which is flush with more than $23 million.**

**Here's the good news, Fellow American._The race remains neck and neck._**

We are planning our own Team Herschel advertising campaign. Will you help us spread our message about holding politicians accountable, reversing the soaring cost of gas and food, reviving our economy, and fighting crime in our neighborhoods?

**Since we didn't launch our campaign until late August, our opponent got an 8-month head start on his fundraising efforts. That's why we cannot afford to miss even a single financial goal during this campaign.**

As our opponent wrote in one of his recent emails, _**"our entire Democratic agenda - from health care to good-paying jobs to voting rights - is on the line in this race, so we can't afford a single misstep."**_

Our opponent is correct that the entire Democrat agenda is on the line in our race. When we win in Georgia, we will flip control of the Senate back to Republican hands so President Biden's partisan agenda will be stopped in its tracks.

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBRA March 28th
body:
South Bay Republican AssemblyMonday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM Hello fellow patriots, I wanted to take a moment to see
| |
---
|
---
## South Bay Republican Assembly
---
## Monday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM
---
|
---
Hello fellow patriots,
I wanted to take a moment to see if any of you have signed up for the convention March 18-20th. If you have and are a member in good standing, I would like to know who would be interested in being a delegate. As of now we are able to have 2 more there as representation of our South Bay club. Please let me know no later than Monday March 14th so that I can submit your name.
I would also like to remind everyone that we will be having our monthly meeting on March 28th at the Walteria Business Men's Club. We have some wonderful speakers that will be joining us and I look forward to hearing from each one of them.
If you have any questions please feel free to reach out to me and I will get back to you shortly.
Blessed and Free,
Nena Gates
President (pro-tem)
nenarenae2@gmail.com
---
|
---
# **Sonya Green**
Business owner of 25 years in Huntington Beach, California, Sonya Green’s sole dream was to help people be the best they can be and build unity within one’s community.
With that goal in mind, she established her own staffing company, now called WorkLand Staffing, rebranded after losing her brother in 2020. Sonya has been successful at placing over 25,000 people into gainful employment.
Sonya is the Founder of the PAC “Patriots for Freedom,” and was an Authorized Personnel for Recall Gavin 2020.
As a business owner, Sonya was awarded 2-time Entrepreneur of the Year by the Orange County Business Journal, awarded by EDD “Most Placed of Unemployed Individuals,” and awarded the One-Stop Dislocated Aerospace Workers Project, where she placed numerous displaced Aerospace workers.
Sonya has been a long-time advocate for the homeless and veterans, and frequently places unemployed U.S. Military Veterans into gainful employment, easing the transition into civilian life. Sonya has recently formed an alliance to remove those who abuse their power in government.
She has been consistently vocal about the mishandling of our judicial system, educational indoctrination, political fractures, budget mismanagement, government overreach and the disregard for our Constitution.
"An alliance of community is a necessity to combat those who are trying to destroy it"
~ Sonya Green
|
---
# **Siaka Massaquoi**
Actor Siaka Massaquoi entered Hollywood with big dreams. However, after witnessing racism firsthand and seeing colleagues lose roles because of their skin color, he began to ask questions. This is his story of breaking free. Siaka is now running for State Assembly and has committed the last several years to fighting for your freedom.
|
---
# **Cole Brocato**
God, family and country are pillars in the Brocato household. Cole was raised to respect his elders, police and first responders. He was taught to have courage and fight for what is right, to respect and love his country, to stand for the flag and kneel before God. With his wife Stephanie by his side, they instill these same principles to their sons Caleb and Xander. Their boys are taught to believe all goals and dreams are achievable, if they are willing to work hard even through life’s adversities. Without a doubt, these opportunities exist because of America’s greatness. The forethought of our founding fathers, the sacrifices made by them and all who’ve fought since that time, are looked at with much gratitude in their family.
---

clean_body: South Bay Republican AssemblyMonday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM Hello fellow patriots, I wanted to take a moment to see | | | South Bay Republican Assembly Monday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM | Hello fellow patriots, I wanted to take a moment to see if any of you have signed up for the convention March 18-20th. If you have and are a member in good standing, I would like to know who would be interested in being a delegate. As of now we are able to have 2 more there as representation of our South Bay club. Please let me know no later than Monday March 14th so that I can submit your name. I would also like to remind everyone that we will be having our monthly meeting on March 28th at the Walteria Business Men's Club. We have some wonderful speakers that will be joining us and I look forward to hearing from each one of them. If you have any questions please feel free to reach out to me and I will get back to you shortly. Blessed and Free, Nena Gates President (pro-tem) nenarenae2@gmail.com | Sonya Green Business owner of 25 years in Huntington Beach, California, Sonya Green’s sole dream was to help people be the best they can be and build unity within one’s community. With that goal in mind, she established her own staffing company, now called WorkLand Staffing, rebranded after losing her brother in 2020. Sonya has been successful at placing over 25,000 people into gainful employment. Sonya is the Founder of the PAC “Patriots for Freedom,” and was an Authorized Personnel for Recall Gavin 2020. As a business owner, Sonya was awarded 2-time Entrepreneur of the Year by the Orange County Business Journal, awarded by EDD “Most Placed of Unemployed Individuals,” and awarded the One-Stop Dislocated Aerospace Workers Project, where she placed numerous displaced Aerospace workers. Sonya has been a long-time advocate for the homeless and veterans, and frequently places unemployed U.S. Military Veterans into gainful employment, easing the transition into civilian life. Sonya has recently formed an alliance to remove those who abuse their power in government. She has been consistently vocal about the mishandling of our judicial system, educational indoctrination, political fractures, budget mismanagement, government overreach and the disregard for our Constitution. "An alliance of community is a necessity to combat those who are trying to destroy it" ~ Sonya Green | Siaka Massaquoi Actor Siaka Massaquoi entered Hollywood with big dreams. However, after witnessing racism firsthand and seeing colleagues lose roles because of their skin color, he began to ask questions. This is his story of breaking free. Siaka is now running for State Assembly and has committed the last several years to fighting for your freedom. | Cole Brocato God, family and country are pillars in the Brocato household. Cole was raised to respect his elders, police and first responders. He was taught to have courage and fight for what is right, to respect and love his country, to stand for the flag and kneel before God. With his wife Stephanie by his side, they instill these same principles to their sons Caleb and Xander. Their boys are taught to believe all goals and dreams are achievable, if they are willing to work hard even through life’s adversities. Without a doubt, these opportunities exist because of America’s greatness. The forethought of our founding fathers, the sacrifices made by them and all who’ve fought since that time, are looked at with much gratitude in their family. ©2022 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA | = "Web Version" = "Preferences" = "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Endorsement alert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
This week, we welcomed the support of Eric Curry, a grassroots activist, direct action organizer, and native San Franciscan who felt called to run to replace Pelosi before endorsing our campaign. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0OwlgM_j2-D0C3pMgrVukURu9xhuFK5a2OXItQtV_7KK3320j7P6XNI4o3hMai540tsZgSsJqSgihcNaJnPBIs8dR4kQ7v1fVHus3jKqPwyvpn-Q7kbxuI5eAcaz9Ckl8GcQZK0Zng2I_nw06cc-VO1HXZLilBfLuMzj359q8otobgMiN-ugHTEEGDQ3Wxq-KEsFzr__zWHgK_IdSaujwYz_mWy0XLRq19PIVTLp4mHLi/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h0/BXHNBArkSsndkV1YWzT6ipc4wxxZf5eJfIfgUt3dEL4)
| | Dear Peter, **** It’s always exciting to welcome new allies to our campaign, and I’m especially excited to introduce one of them to you. Our most recent endorsement is from Eric Curry, who—like me—ran to replace Pelosi as San Francisco’s voice in the House. We’ve collaborated on several projects over the past year, from direct action promoting universal healthcare to joint statements calling out institutional racism. I’m grateful for his recent announcement endorsing our campaign. [**Can you join us in supporting our campaign to finally end the Pelosi dynasty? We’re building an expanding coalition and invite you to help us expand it!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5O8chfpFGdgApL7fAAwime6j8pvFBJ33jbCWwTr2aacZjHj1Owuwc4VlZysM034Nyx7TaetIagjYJo6sy9WXX5hRPAAGZT9yAv9qo7SwwdMFNfxpDMf5H1lU40jXLmt-5yHSaYvq1gXWIBewXvqHB6V-IIst927hgW6HCPVp4nHDlYFRHMX21aMcHuFbJWn_x7vhjSP-EKaPlu4ClVXzMPFdFv3LXGKBqbeu0v-CHiHEmVABTO2C0LRKWeOUZxp0UKgUy3NaHY42OxlLEoQkCuvo7Lud20iBRNCZW1PPCYcpyd0zecTtOKCVKSVQU25pV/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h1/ih0UscoCX-UmYMc0lA-djSNTc7KyH3mEGOhHZk0jR3k) Eric Curry is a grassroots activist, direct action organizer, small business owner, and native San Franciscan. As a man of color challenging the city’s power establishment and Democratic Party machine by mobilizing grassroots support, he reminded me a lot of myself. That was true even before we met, and eventually took action alongside each other from the East Bay to the streets outside Nancy Pelosi’s house. I’m deeply grateful for [Eric’s support](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpleEIPZRIIv05HpmcIz4-uhcQYfh9LBlV5TA8QLgFf8dcgoTsVr1xszTiIg3LJnzx9lC7WnDvE2BzG91267XbJNpOnDH975xAHw6QW5RKAVuQAP4Tlb9sBEJdjKNQkxAJvB0Gv7HYOaCSXW_2oLyMD7ajyMraTRel2pMAddfhYZxfMjgTsyqfS4aYC0-vo7ZWfDRCegX9A6cnqSDqmbg4ktSdEfnxfNd2kVt7-kN8nlaHe4MhVdLJ3vxWosEgop9ORUmMJOT-sG0NdYbcu8vKGmS7sXIoLWGHqhXKimqfm3/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h2/Ci62wnhA-McvhHS6cr8KqE94CNbqdYgfjK4yS2_c1s8). I’m equally outraged to observe [the dynamics that drove him from the race](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpleEIPZRIIv05HpmcIz4-tvSHIrZDZLsfgasvtiMqgAJBxIuH_7oPI-gSgbdvVgGu7t6XyV7CW1u0nEnki_cLV_MewTtA9QShFuKLeOKlmi0GhpraW9SP4G4CroQvuOdsIX8GsKhRCuJQnKkcDloXj-iHbywt72_v6Q9NHoNYT0FNEBlLXEPzSM0EOOVtP9Y39QjlO4LXkOV-MySz4A2VjsYSve-whj4eW4kpH7iXhklzoZtGuU6IO9-4w1JQ6BBtxjop2yUMeRJX_obhiXtZFcn2ScT9v-YxngN7i9cI2k/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h3/xLc4zhiOYUEyLnKx7Hc9i4-51uxHE1fjJtTASclC0ao). They include some of the same headwinds that emerged to blunt our campaign’s momentum in 2020, after we—with your support—had forced Pelosi to shift on half a dozen policies. Eric is a mixed-raced gay man who grew up in San Francisco. After announcing his campaign challenging Pelosi, he confronted bias, ad hominem attacks, and the smug self-assurance of “progressive” values from the leaders of some of the very same “grassroots” groups in San Francisco that orchestrated a racist character assassination in 2020 to insulate Pelosi from our challenge. [**Can you stand with us against the bias and demagoguery of the smugly self-assured local establishment?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5O8chfpFGdgApL7fAAwime2hxJ-gxdFGoXg1rXZ3OZR282RsnUVVZB_1NZ677uuJoAqorqsZGPYgU8xc_qEynR2lfxk0MKo4XgUjfy8IJAm_CteePufgmBWfcfVYRZUVuHsJ6LyPTJsZrYlrUvc9Tbn7Ze7pmWjHuLnhkNRM6JLB2f3bxacCLlgDde0EVe9bfneqqY3wVLBUQ3we-mFt7TqomAFyMsoYYSMrsxm7SfGcOBlRoxAB2oBCQNB-u3W8QKIzHPlt19tFYmQ5WkdqhwVoaMrdR9pUL6nTArI0BJMd7DbDPNQl_NTHWP_Y3e_oc/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h4/x3_CoM9rCZ2QZxdUu5t2H9FVZsZWhL-d1wii-3T_HZU) In a previous era, northern support for civil rights activists in the South proved crucial to expose local corruption. Today, multiple candidates of color in San Francisco have called out a pattern that persists only because the local establishment refuses to acknowledge it. The latest [public revelations](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPj7QrptSt14tfAVq0YlhiUnGHVOaQtA0vFOlQ-wTVoukMXDZ3e_e5uaE6K6do_qdo9uofcGNuyISiRhku8tLxpmU2R_h-W1Nr-4rjP6teG3sxNpXQXXxvJpfviXY447cNoFU9BkFzpAtLLI5famP4Fe55NzxD-M5BX-oDxM8eu9CzdmAWjO6gooUsstgM1x2bluztcYdLBiYdEXf__b13i1lIKko2x4A86_ncTHpMzHOLh4VZovt4afMM_oxuK4Wua95xfOGn8tu-dExooRN9Ucevu9Ayxpi0IHkGoR-BFTsr0N4bJxLy8fySIQfhMwEg/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h5/cnKVJznP7iK7PZVcQCa3IV2gSw2jTJF0yorMb1WCaEk) about the plot targeting our campaign & San Francisco voters in 2020 include the documentation of payments from a former tech executive (who now leads a public relations firm) to local media outlets. They unethically published his fabrications not only without investigating—but also without disclosing their own conflicts of interest, let alone those of their self-serving sources. Those revelations came on the heels of whistleblower [Gloria Berry's 2021 exposé](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTLY2u3YHPIM3KX2WLf6ifWQ_rWiyf_2ZGRtME2XxofXa00CXRW8ou6hT7DH4FOsYJTAeFVk5A8dHhUY3luxVZUDTxviJzq9dXl-2jfHujNw2jxE8HZv1gG8DThU-NW3q7fkd5F10ZGX59lmwCwrCgw-k3MYC5wnXcvE8WgGtZ3k0widQaZrJX-AJMtz12uRDjqxJUjIVpRyWt-_SurBhv28uZAifKlAGQFajLBaxYlgSXacgHGyjtlKl5MPv1zg3JMvXATH4uZGfi6Vj_J6DGKJpEcEVh-bQ_RW1bJzE6HBi/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h6/OVFMKBsL8JzmjKa_2U6xmaitO7lZkPf9VimAvuPDW74) reaching a wider audience than ever through the [SF Gate's long overdue reference](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDAq19NGl8C0OxpU1rLrBiltq-tVDU1u_HAJ56wYjv83sBD_LQ1VPWMsGx7hB7Ce3bwMGBs1OE-_icpyAcKf5KfDmjUPomhWukpKyPCUgQY86szh9dgaqXpPS72fE2k-Ui7CHMjxg7sS-lt0z7sCMpuQCYIg-P_OWrUtAEG7ta2Nsw_246YFunW3POC_nE5Mm2-kfTe2WPONZtZIVJ0xY-zi43tFhhFbXAf3Jm8bM70oIiGKSXtDyEUSTH1a0SqomkhWzt88QoMKNVOX8SYAM8p17DKkU7d2211aRdq-hPQ7rEGxVPG2alHLL482NF82bUtLd0MWoo20tA9F1tfHZVXl3FQqfjTZkdb-qKD3Zaqun/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h7/dhS-Z1f8P4X9lOYCDaIBAJk__NUQ9hRd3aZKSXve2HA) to it. More previously unreported facts revealing the corruption and depravity of the Democratic Party’s use of racist character assassination as an election strategy remain forthcoming. They ultimately make the false, politically motivated, racist accusations weaponized to insulate Pelosi pale by comparison. Eric said to me that he didn’t think he could take it if he was forced to endure what I did in 2020. Hearing that redoubled my resolve, even as it broke my heart. I’ve often thought of my persistence—despite the attacks on my name and character—as necessary to defend the integrity of the electoral process. I particularly wonder what lessons other candidates of color are poised to learn from watching my experience at the hands of San Francisco’s white “progressive” establishment. It was jarring to discover how prescient my concerns were. Having come to realize the depth of Eric’s commitment to the issues, watching a fellow candidate of color feel driven out of the election by the corruption of local groups felt downright painful—not unlike the trauma from being publicly subjected to their smears in 2020. People who have suffered in retaliation for standing up for the truth share a common bond. It’s one reason why I have always had such deep respect for whistleblowers, from those who expose federal government corruption like Edward Snowden, to their local counterparts who expose local partisan corruption like Gloria Berry. It’s another reason why I’m still here: I recognize that fire can help forge stronger steel. Having been battle-tested by everything from enduring false accusation and overcoming the racism embodied by petty partisan climbers, to forcing the corrupt party leadership to sink to such unethical depths to defend itself in the first place, I’m ready to finish the job with your support. [**Can you join us again today to expand our work, reach more voters, and hold the corporate establishment accountable? Power concedes nothing without a demand, and the strength of our demands are a function of the support we receive from supporters like you.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5O8chfpFGdgApL7fAAwime56IFjlLKpvHkavcR9pB7BoyjXR40vczoP8AlPyluKUXTKW2D0KAe7KH_B4MyVxDLJ0I47_I0fwezGZPFzG054jF5NGsyhrdidjH3HJ81G2VtqRgPse6HmuC9iNmgo2vbz_cZGpGWv223HdcduzVFK1jl3b2ArBA8W2zY26YvMXhj5P7w2fxfwN_sUiqvobCVqJVngs8rjXvJuWL6r8OuBcXbU7A5LSJLd5YYgINDWiyGTdD_V-XwHkE8gGPgdHTuqan_ef6wyqU8wquCtv_GZVtfPEryVgTKwhWzv4-N3Zl/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h8/ivEHttnqATsyQYaSLd-moAsXM4ZTnOH9yyhJXD_sCHI) We’re vastly outgunned by the dynastic corporate incumbent and the establishment she represents. That’s why I’m all the more grateful for your help and support—and Eric's—as we continue building momentum to confront and overcome them. Thanks for standing with us! Your voice, Shahid P.S. — Want to learn more about our work holding the press accountable for abandoning ethics, accuracy, and democratic accountability? Mark your calendar and [join us for a crucial court hearing](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmk0BXJxEM8XutBsFmGVNDiLYFj7IMkuRBlM1t2AnHeNibcxweO43CjLnG86lkpUMFt7GpZAsJmsDbZxs_t1b_hWUhqzGNoFDLgUXjSPU0dOxscZEv3-6y5Mju-Fggh7RpXZ5qo1wCTF7Yubdl19h77n2m4mGq-2tNOJgaw0TcbXyta9soq9EAwVn2B_fwXgnwRQ-K8sSFHqW3W57xx-u-TTWNqd1NaFRKAUwelZUDPRBqhOQBBta-HT91IUTtItVE/3ka/kcl8DysORzCKKj_ENql_hA/h9/SfSkNMHz58E_w3HcfyiQwvihzoSMlKvSO1WNadzb9SU) via zoom on St. Patrick's Day, Thursday March 17! |

They include some of the same headwinds that emerged to blunt our campaign’s momentum in 2020, after we—with your support—had forced Pelosi to shift on half a dozen policies. Eric is a mixed-raced gay man who grew up in San Francisco. After announcing his campaign challenging Pelosi, he confronted bias, ad hominem attacks, and the smug self-assurance of “progressive” values from the leaders of some of the very same “grassroots” groups in San Francisco that orchestrated a racist character assassination in 2020 to insulate Pelosi from our challenge. In a previous era, northern support for civil rights activists in the South proved crucial to expose local corruption. Today, multiple candidates of color in San Francisco have called out a pattern that persists only because the local establishment refuses to acknowledge it. The latest about the plot targeting our campaign & San Francisco voters in 2020 include the documentation of payments from a former tech executive (who now leads a public relations firm) to local media outlets. They unethically published his fabrications not only without investigating—but also without disclosing their own conflicts of interest, let alone those of their self-serving sources. Those revelations came on the heels of whistleblower reaching a wider audience than ever through the to it. More previously unreported facts revealing the corruption and depravity of the Democratic Party’s use of racist character assassination as an election strategy remain forthcoming. They ultimately make the false, politically motivated, racist accusations weaponized to insulate Pelosi pale by comparison. Eric said to me that he didn’t think he could take it if he was forced to endure what I did in 2020. Hearing that redoubled my resolve, even as it broke my heart. I’ve often thought of my persistence—despite the attacks on my name and character—as necessary to defend the integrity of the electoral process. I particularly wonder what lessons other candidates of color are poised to learn from watching my experience at the hands of San Francisco’s white “progressive” establishment. It was jarring to discover how prescient my concerns were. Having come to realize the depth of Eric’s commitment to the issues, watching a fellow candidate of color feel driven out of the election by the corruption of local groups felt downright painful—not unlike the trauma from being publicly subjected to their smears in 2020. People who have suffered in retaliation for standing up for the truth share a common bond. It’s one reason why I have always had such deep respect for whistleblowers, from those who expose federal government corruption like Edward Snowden, to their local counterparts who expose local partisan corruption like Gloria Berry. It’s another reason why I’m still here: I recognize that fire can help forge stronger steel. Having been battle-tested by everything from enduring false accusation and overcoming the racism embodied by petty partisan climbers, to forcing the corrupt party leadership to sink to such unethical depths to defend itself in the first place, I’m ready to finish the job with your support. We’re vastly outgunned by the dynastic corporate incumbent and the establishment she represents. That’s why I’m all the more grateful for your help and support—and Eric's—as we continue building momentum to confront and overcome them. Thanks for standing with us! Your voice, Shahid P.S. — Want to learn more about our work holding the press accountable for abandoning ethics, accuracy, and democratic accountability? Mark your calendar and via zoom on St. Patrick's Day, Thursday March 17! | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Mosaics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220312-2861-header&t=1&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO)
Sometimes people will ask me, “There is so much happening in the world and in the country, and it all feels so big and overwhelming - what can I even do as one person?” What I try to convey every time is that no action is too small, and if you feel so moved, you can and should start with whatever is within arm’s reach or in your backyard. You can even start with yourself.
We live in a culture of grand gestures and big ambitions, but that also means we should be wary of how much “get-rich-quick” thinking can perpetuate beyond money schemes and into the idea that any/all major, impactful shifts happen suddenly and in dramatic fashion with a handful of major figures. The fact is, that couldn’t be further from the truth. Revolutionary and transformative changes, from the inside out, happen more like mosaics.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220312-2861-P_OTH_EXP_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2861_2526796_80kqAO&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO)
Think of it like this: no matter who we are, how visible or invisible or big or small, each one of us is just one tile. Whether you see that as liberating or disempowering is a matter of perspective. When you have your eye pressed all the way up to the single tile of a mosaic, it can look quite meaningless. A single piece of shattered glass could look worthless. Or perhaps a piece of small painted porcelain could seem beautiful, but too small to “be” anything. Or maybe a stunning rare slab of stone may think itself as the biggest piece when it is really a corner tile. The secret is, it’s all significant.
**The two secrets of mosaics are:**
1. Each piece (us + our small actions) is far more powerful and meaningful than we know, and
2. Each piece (we) need each other far more than we realize.

When we are able to step back from thinking our own broken, unfinished pieces are not enough, and start to see how all the other little pieces glistening alongside us start to form eyes and ears and abstract beauty and landscapes and symbols and more, we realize that just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one. So just do the small thing - for yourself and others. Choose your actions with humility, love, and enthusiasm. It means more than you know, and the world thanks you for it.
Take heart,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220312-2861-P_OTH_EXP_ORG&t=3&refcode2=2861_2526796_80kqAO&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220312-2861-P_OTH_EXP_ORG&t=4&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2861%2E2526796%2E80kqAO)
